title: Paul Chan announces push to get everyone using AI
news_content:
Financial Secretary Paul Chan on Wednesday announced that he will chair a new "Committee on AI+ and Industry Development Strategy" as part of efforts to ensure all levels of society understand and make use of artificial intelligence.

In his budget speech in the Legislative Council, Chan said the committee will come up with strategies and create favourable conditions for AI to "empower the transformation and development of industries".

"The committee will comprise experts, academics, enterprises and industry park companies with an initial focus on life and health technology and embodied AI," Chan said.

He said while AI brings new opportunities to the job market and society as a whole, the key lies in deepening everyone's understanding and use of the technology. 

To boost awareness and application skills, as well as the responsible use of AI, the government will allocate HK$50 million for public groups to work with technology firms and tertiary institutions in organising AI application courses, seminars and competitions.

Chan also noted the roll-out of STEAM [Science, Technology, Engineering, the Arts and Mathematics] courses at the SAR's subsidised universities, with 27 undergraduate programmes covering areas such as AI, creative industries and data science to be launched over the next few years. 

From the 2027/28 academic year, AI‑related programmes will be given priority to be included in the Study Subsidy Scheme for Designated Professions/Sectors for self-financing post-secondary institutions.

Chan said the Employees Retraining Board will also be upgraded as "Upskill Hong Kong", to provide courses involving various skills, including AI application, to "enhance the competitiveness of the local workforce".



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 港股半日升199點　內需及內房股上升
news_content:
港股反覆向好，恒指半日收報26789點，升199點，升幅0.75%。成交額約1223億元。

科技指數報5288點，升幅0.34%。ATMXJ個別發展，騰訊、美團升逾1%至2%以上，但小米偏軟。

中資保險股上升，中人壽、平保升近2%或以上。個別內需股、內房股上升。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 財政預算案｜申請注資100億元成立起始資金　支持洪水橋產業園
滙控去年普通股股東應佔利潤跌近8%
news_content:
滙控公布，去年普通股股東應佔利潤約211億美元，按年跌近8%。去年列賬基準除稅前利潤299.07億美元，按年跌7.4%；以固定匯率計，除稅前利潤同樣是299.07億美元，按年跌7.6%。 

滙控派發第4次股息每股45美仙，全年派息合共75美仙。派息比率維持50%，集團目標未來3年維持相同水平。

集團表示，預計將透過自身業務資本生成，以及在普通股權一級資本比率重回或高於目標範圍之前不啟動任何進一步股份回購，使普通股權一級資本比率恢復至目標範圍內。重新啟動股份回購的決定，將取決於集團按季度進行的回購考慮及流程。

滙控去年普通股權一級資本比率維持於14.9%，集團繼續將普通股權一級資本比率的中期目標範圍維持在14%至14.5%之間。由於私有化恒生銀行對今年1月的普通股權一級資本產生110個基點淨影響，資本比率於今年1月可能跌至低於目標範圍。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 財政預算案｜電動私家車首次登記稅寬減3月底屆滿後不再繼續
財政預算案｜「提升保險業人才培訓計劃」延長3年
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波在新一份預算案提及，當局通過「創科實習計劃」鼓勵大學生體驗創科相關工作，至今已提供近兩萬個實習機會。「研究人才庫計劃」批出15000多個申請，資助機構聘請修讀STEM的大學畢業生從事研發。

他表示，「提升保險業人才培訓計劃」將延長3年，聚焦提升從業員的專業能力。香港國際法律人才培訓學院已為各地超過2000名人士提供專業實務培訓，並將繼續與內地、「一帶一路」及其他司法區法律及爭議解決的業界分享經驗。

另外，陳茂波指出，香港國際航空學院今年將與中大合辦全新的航空管理碩士課程。學院已與一家海外航空服務公司成立航空工程培訓中心，推出一系列飛機維修及部件處理和認證的專業課程。當局亦會繼續培育建造業專業人才，應付未來的人手需求。為協助更多畢業生獲取專業資格，政府會撥款6500萬元，增加今年政府培訓學額。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 財政預算案｜籌建香港國際法律事務大樓　打造國際法律樞紐新地標
news_content:
新一份財政預算案提出，政府將強化規範香港調解專業的認證和紀律制度，年內推進立法工作。律政司亦正籌備興建香港國際法律事務大樓，打造成國際法律樞紐的新地標，匯集香港國際法律人才培訓學院總部、國際法律及爭議解決服務機構等。工程前期工作年內開展。

財政司司長陳茂波表示，律政司去年底正式啟動的香港專業服務出海平台，組織跨專業服務團隊支持內地企業以香港作為首選平台出海。律政司亦會繼續吸引國際法律及爭議解決服務機構在香港設立辦事處，其中國際統一私法協會今年在香港設立亞太地區聯絡辦公室。

他又說，本港已推出「體育爭議解決先導計劃」，推動發展本港成為國際體育爭議解決中心。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 財政預算案｜撥款2億元推「北都城鄉共融基金」先導計劃推展鄉郊
財政預算案｜旅發局將以光影巡禮為主題全新表演取代幻彩詠香江
news_content:
新一份預算案提出，旅發局將推出以光影巡禮為主題的全新表演，取代「幻彩詠香江」，在全年不同日子和地方舉行。

財政司司長陳茂波表示，去年訪港旅客人次上升12%，為相關行業創造商機及就業機會，來年政府會向旅發局撥款16.6億元。香港是「亞洲盛事之都」，旅發局將加大旗艦活動的規模及宣傳，引入新亮點，延長活動時間，並推出更多特色節慶活動，凸顯香港薈萃中西的吸引力。

旅發局亦會加強向具潛力的客源市場推廣，包括廣東省以外的內地城市，以及東盟、中東等新興市場，吸引更多過夜旅客。

陳茂波又提到，去年訪港郵輪達189航次，按年增加26%。旅發局會進一步吸引更多國際郵輪將香港納入行程。當局會繼續深化與大灣區及內地其他省市的旅遊協作，並與航空公司探討推出「一程多站」行程，吸引更多海外旅客到訪香港及內地。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: Govt eyes HK$10bn each for Hetao, San Tin developments
news_content:
The government is seeking to pour in a total of HK$20 billion for the development of two major tech hubs in Hong Kong, the finance chief announced on Wednesday. 

Delivering his latest budget, Financial Secretary Paul Chan said officials would ask for the legislature's approval to inject HK$10 billion to "accelerate the development" of the Hong Kong park under the Hetao Shenzhen-Hong Kong Science and Technology Innovation Cooperation Zone.

Authorities will engage the market to speed up the disposal of the remaining land parcels under the area's first development phase, provide key infrastructure, strengthen support to start-ups and establish a venture fund, Chan added. 

"We are seeking to facilitate the convenient flow of personnel, materials, capital and data between the Shenzhen Park and Hong Kong Park," the finance chief said. 

"We are also exploring with the mainland the formulation of specific implementation plans to allow cross-boundary flow of research data and biosamples, such as 'white list' and 'green lane' mechanisms to streamline entry/exit procedures and approval processes."

Chan said another HK$10 billion would be sought as initial capital as the government is setting up a dedicated company this year to take forward the San Tin Technopole, which is part of the Northern Metropolis. 

He said while the Hetao Park focuses on research and development as well as commercialisation, the San Tin Technopole will offer a large piece of land for industrial space dedicated to prototyping and mass production.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 財政預算案｜預留100億元以貸款方式支持北都大學城校舍發展
財政預算案｜成立稅務政策諮詢委員會　令稅務政策更好支持經濟發
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波在新一份財政預算案表示，稅務政策是經濟競爭力的重要一環，近年國際稅務環境不斷改變。他會成立並主持「稅務政策諮詢委員會」，廣納工商專業界別人士的意見，使香港的稅務政策更好支持經濟發展。

陳茂波表示，面對複雜多變的地緣政經格局，將通過一系列政策措施，全方位鞏固和提升香港國際貿易中心地位。招商引資方面，他說，已制訂促進產業和投資的優惠政策包的初步框架，會考慮企業的所屬行業和技術水平、為香港帶來的經濟貢獻和就業機會等。政策工具包括批地安排、財政資助或稅務減免，優惠稅率為半稅或5%，將於年內提交條例修訂草案。

他表示，為幫助內地企業走出去，會設立跨界別專業服務平台，集合法律、會計、財務、檢測和認證、市場推廣等香港專業服務提供者，支持出海企業。

另外，政府會向「BUD專項基金」注資2億元，將「申請易」的資助上限提高至每宗15萬元，並為企業應用AI提供更針對性資助。就「中小企融資擔保計劃」，當局已把8成擔保產品的申請期延長至2028年3月底，同時將「還息不還本」安排的申請期延長至今年11月中，計劃下的總信貸保證承擔額將增加200億元。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: Key role for HK in aligning with 15th Five-Year Plan
news_content:
Hong Kong is poised to play a pivotal role in several key areas of national development as the city aligns itself with the goals of the country's 15th Five-Year Plan, Financial Secretary Paul Chan said.

In his budget speech on Wednesday, Chan outlined how Hong Kong could contribute to building a modernised industrial system, accelerating the country’s high-level scientific and technological self-reliance and supporting high-standard opening up, while also serving as a global hub for top-tier talent.

This year marks the beginning of the national 15th Five-Year Plan, and Chan stressed the importance of approaching it with an innovative mindset. 

“We must embrace the 15th Five-Year Plan with an innovative mindset, fostering new quality productive forces in accordance with local conditions,” he said.

Chan noted that the recommendations for the 15th Five-Year Plan explicitly support Hong Kong in better integrating into and serving the broader national agenda. 

The plan, he said, reinforces the SAR’s role as an international financial, shipping and trade centre, while also supporting its development into a global innovation and technology hub and a magnet for high-calibre talent.

“With strong basic research capabilities, Hong Kong possesses a unique edge in AI, life and health technology, fintech, as well as new materials and new energy,” Chan said. 

He also underscored the city’s financial prowess, driving the “Finance+” initiative aimed at capitalising the sector to better serve the real economy and industries with competitive advantages. 

“In so doing, we can leverage our strengths to serve the country’s needs,” Chan added.

On the international front, Chan emphasised Hong Kong’s role in promoting high-standard opening up. 

Under the "One Country, Two Systems” principle, the city offers unique institutional advantages, he said.

“With our efficient aviation, shipping and logistics services, we serve as a ‘super connector’ and ‘super value-adder’ to help enterprises go global and bring in external investments, fostering two-way trade and investment,” Chan said.

He also touched on Hong Kong’s ability to attract and nurture global talent. 

“Hong Kong’s world-class universities and internationalised environment are conducive to attracting and bringing in top global talents in various sectors, particularly leading experts in the scientific research field from around the world,” he said. 

He added that the city would continue to develop local talent in line with the national strategy of integrating education, technology and talent.

Looking ahead, Chan announced that Chief Executive John Lee would lead a cross-bureau, cross-departmental task force to proactively align Hong Kong with the 15th Five-Year Plan. 

The city would also formulate its own five-year plan for the very first time. 

“We will integrate more actively into and serve the overall national development," Chan said. 

"With the synergy between a capable government and an efficient market, we aim at driving high-quality, high value-added and diversified economic growth."


Edited by Edmond Fong

title: 財政預算案｜預留5200萬元開辦知識產權學院　目標今年底啟動
news_content:
新一份財政預算案提出，知識產權署將與職訓局合作推行為期兩年的先導計劃，開辦「知識產權學院」，提供與資歷架構掛鈎的在職培訓，目標今年底啟動。當局已預留5200萬元。

財政司司長陳茂波說，正就購買知識產權或使用權的資本開支扣稅安排，諮詢業界，計劃年內提交條例修訂草案。降低成本可促成更多相關交易，有利知識密集型產業發展，鞏固香港作為區域知識產權貿易中心的地位。

他又說，政府已預留2800萬元予香港技術與創新支持中心，讓其以國家標準為基礎，向創科企業提供專利質素分析，以及落實為期兩年的「專利估值先導支援計劃」，協助創科企業為專利資產估值。


編輯：譚佩貞

title: 財政預算案｜上半年提交修例草案　優化海運服務業稅務優惠
財政預算案｜港交所首季修訂「同股不同權」
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波表示，港交所首季就修訂「同股不同權」企業上市要求、便利海外發行人第二上市、優化首次公開招股流程，以及為生物科技和特專科技公司申請上市提供更多彈性等諮詢市場。

他表示，交易所在上半年落實完善結構性產品上市框架，以及就推動「T+1」結算周期的具體實施方案諮詢市場。

另外，當局亦會推進下一階段改革，包括優化上市公司持續規管架構；為海外公司來港第二上市提供具體指引；納入更多海外市場為認可交易所；以及繼續與市場探討為退市或需特殊處理股份提供場外交易平台。

在人民幣方面，陳茂波說，會積極與內地研究加快落實在香港推出國債期貨、將房地產投資信託基金納入互聯互通、將人民幣交易櫃台納入港股通，以及探索持續優化債券通；聯同業界積極拓展離岸人民幣利率曲線的構建，研究強化短中期利率市場價格發現功能的具體措施等；亦會吸引高質量發行人增加在香港發行人民幣債券。

陳茂波又提到，債券電子交易平台將在下半年推出；政府亦將繼續定期發行代幣化債券，金管局亦會通過「數碼債券資助計劃」鼓勵更多數碼債券在港發行。

陳茂波表示，港交所2024年9月實施「打風不停市」安排以來，有7個交易日在惡劣天氣下如常開市，確保市場流動性，並帶來約25億元印花稅收入。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 財政預算案｜「優質教育基金」預留20億元開展校本AI教育項目
news_content:
預算案提出全民AI培訓，將邀請不同公營機構聯同科技企業及大專院校，籌辦AI應用學習課程、講座及比賽，並為此撥款5千萬元；「優質教育基金」已預留20億元推進中小學數字教育，開展校本AI教育項目。

預算案又說，自2025／26起的3個學年，各資助大學將新增共27個與STEAM相關的學士學位課程；自資專上院校方面，由2027／28學年起，AI相關課程將優先列入「指定專業／界別課程資助計劃」；僱員再培訓局將升格為「技能提升局」，並會提供包括AI應用的各類「技能為本」培訓，提升本地勞動人口的競爭力。

預算案提到，財政司司長陳茂波會成立並主持「AI+與產業發展策略委員會」，為AI帶動產業轉型及發展訂定策略，並邀請專家、學者、企業及園區公司等參與，初期將聚焦生命健康及具身智能。

預算案又說，政府推出的30億元「人工智能資助計劃」，已批出近30個涉及大語言模型、新材料、生物醫學等領域的科研項目；政府正積極對接國家「人工智能+」行動，以應用場景驅動「AI產業化、產業AI化」，香港人工智能研發院將於下半年投入運作，支持AI項目研發及成果轉化。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 財政預算案｜中小企融資擔保計劃繼續　還息不還本延長至11月中
財政預算案｜撥款一億元引入業界領先技術加速政府數智化轉型
news_content:
新一份財政預算案表示，多個部門正積極利用AI及相關科技，提升公共服務水平，涵蓋交通管理、就業服務、水浸預警和山泥傾瀉風險評估。

預算案提到，運輸署將研究建立結合大數據分析和AI的交通管理平台，更全面掌握交通實況及提升管理效率；勞工處會運用AI優化就業配對，為求職人士及僱主提供更好服務；渠務署將提升智慧水浸預測及預警系統，亦通過AI大型視覺語言模型，分析道路影像，加快緊急應變速度；土木工程拓展署年內將全面整合本港降雨數據、山泥傾瀉記錄及人造斜坡資料，實時進行動態風險評估，優化預警機制。

預算案指出，政府已成立AI效能提升組，將會撥款一億元，引入業界的領先技術，加速政府數智化轉型。政府也會增撥資源，讓統計處為其他部門提供更多數據科學諮詢及分析，辨識業務痛點及建議解決方案，統計處下月推出全新網上數據互動服務平台，便利企業和市民進行跨主題分析。




編輯：黃佩珊

title: 財政預算案｜港投公司已投資逾190個項目　政府將適時注資
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波表示，考慮到港投公司620億元起始資金已經大致分配，將會適時注資，進一步推動創科發展和產業羣聚。

陳茂波發表新一份財政預算案時提到，港投公司全面營運至今，累計投資超過190個項目，主要包括硬科技、生命科技、新能源及綠色科技等範疇，其中10間企業已在港上市，另有逾20間正籌備今年上市。

他說，港投公司每1元投資，成功帶動超過8元長期資本跟投，高效匯聚國際市場耐心資本力量，合力推動前沿科技加速發展和應用創新。



編輯：宋家樑

title: HK's economy to grow 2.5pc to 3.5pc this year: FS
news_content:
Financial Secretary Paul Chan on Wednesday forecast that the city's economy would grow between 2.5 percent and 3.5 percent this year, after recording an annual growth rate of 3.5 percent in 2025. 

In his much-anticipated budget speech, Chan also predicted  the city's economy would rise by three percent year on year each year in real terms between 2027 and 2030. 

"In the medium term, protectionism will persist in some major economies, while fragmentation of the global economy will continue," he said.

"Nevertheless, the rise of the 'Global South' and the reshaping of the global trade and investment landscape will unlock new markets and new growth areas for Hong Kong," he added.

The finance minister noted the SAR would also proactively align with the national 15th Five-Year Plan, while integrating with the Greater Bay Area to better serve the country's growth.

He added the government was committed to expediting the development of the Northern Metropolis mega project, to further drive innovation and technology growth, while luring more talent to the city.

On inflation, however, Chan warned consumer prices could be "moderately higher" than last year, with the key consumer price gauge rising by 1.8 percent.

Meanwhile, underlying inflation, or the gauge netting out the effects of the government's one-off measures, would stand 1.7 percent this year, he added.

That compared to the 1.1 percent underlying inflation rate registered last year.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 財政預算案｜加速自動駕駛無人化　航天走廊自動駕駛料年內啟用
財政預算案｜申請注資100億元加速河套香港園區發展
財政預算案｜預留2.2億元在港建首個境外國家製造業創新中心
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波表示，會預留約2億2千萬元，在港建設首個境外的國家製造業創新中心。他說，政府致力落實與國家工業和信息化部簽署的《關於發展新質生產力推進新型工業化的合作協議》，促進產業合作。

陳茂波在立法會宣讀新一份財政預算案，表示政府積極引導本地生產商轉向智能製造，技術包括物聯網、實時數據、應用數據分析、先進人機界面，以及機械人技術等。「新型工業化資助計劃」已支持超過120條新智能生產線，帶動超過10億元私人投資。此外，「新型工業加速計劃」鼓勵企業在港設立高端智能生產設施，至今已支持4個項目，涉及總投資約25億元，當中超過七成為私人投資。

陳茂波又說，政府將於年內推出「新型工業菁英企業培育計劃」，重點扶持對本港新型工業發展有貢獻的高增長企業，為香港培育新興和未來產業企業。至於香港微電子研發院的第三代半導體芯片技術研發與試產的中試線，年內將投入運作，可促進本地芯片研發和產業升級。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: 中方稱於緊急特別聯大投票立場體現中方於烏克蘭問題一貫原則立場
news_content:
中國常駐聯合國代表團參贊滕飛，在緊急特別聯合國大會表決支持烏克蘭持久和平決議草案後的解釋性發言中表示，中方期待國際社會為推動危機政治解決，創造有利氣氛，期待聯大為凝聚會員國和平共識，發揮建設性作用，中方亦將繼續為推動危機政治解決，作出積極努力。

滕飛說，中方對付諸表決的聯大決議草案，投了棄權票，這個投票立場體現了中方在烏克蘭問題上的一貫原則和立場。

滕飛說中方始終認為，各國主權和領土完整，都應該得到尊重，聯合國憲章宗旨和原則都應該得到遵守，各方合理安全關切都應該得到重視，一切有利於和平解決危機的努力，都應該得到支持。



編輯：羅宇光

title: 財政預算案｜明年成立國際臨床試驗學院　助力發展國際醫療樞紐
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波表示，正積極推進生命健康科技的上中下游協同發展，包括以「1+3」的模式推進，即河套香港園區的生命健康研發總院，加上 3所由大學籌建的分院，而 InnoHK亦有多所研發中心；中游成果轉化方面，「產學研1+計劃」已支持15個項目；下游產業方面，3大創科園區已匯聚近500間相關企業和機構。

陳茂波宣讀新一份財政預算案，表示河套香港園區的粵港澳大灣區國際臨床試驗所已與深圳園區建立協作平台，提供一站式臨床試驗支援、匯聚科研人員、整合數據庫，推動生物醫藥及疫苗研發，而「國際臨床試驗學院」將於明年成立，助力香港發展成為國際醫療創新樞紐。

他又表示，將向「中醫藥發展基金」注資5億元，就策略性主題進行研究、培訓及國際推廣。


編輯：譚佩貞

title: 財政預算案｜主動對接十五五規劃　AI等多個重點領域發揮作用
news_content:
財政預算案提出，主動對接「十五五」規劃，香港可在多個重點領域發揮作用。

財政司司長陳茂波表示，香港基礎科研實力雄厚，在人工智能、生命健康科技、金融科技，以及新材料和新能源等領域具備獨特優勢。香港亦會推進「金融+」，善用金融更好服務實體經濟與優勢產業，並加快推進金融與創科相互賦能。他強調，香港可貢獻國家現代化産業體系建設、加快高水平科技自立自強。

他指出，香港可積極參與國家擴大高水平對外開放。在「一國兩制」下，本港獨特的制度優勢，加上高效的航空、航運和物流服務，能促進雙向貿易與投資，為企業的「引進來、走出去」擔當「超級聯繫人」和「超級增值人」角色。

陳茂波認為香港的世界級大學及國際化環境，有利吸引及匯聚各重點領域的頂尖人才來港，包括國際科研領軍人物。當局亦會繼續投入資源培育本地人才，配合國家推進「教育─科技─人才」一體化發展。

他重申，行政長官將率領跨局跨部門專班，帶領香港主動對接「十五五」規劃，並首次制訂香港的五年規劃。當局會更積極融入和服務國家發展大局，以有為政府結合高效市場，推動經濟朝高質量、高增值、多元化的方向前行。




編輯：譚佩貞

title: 默茨抵京展開就任德國總理以來首次訪華行程
news_content:
德國總理默茨抵達北京，展開他就任以來的首次訪華行程。

默茨乘坐的飛機，今日上午抵達北京首都國際機場，是農曆馬年中方接待訪華的首位外國領導人。

訪華期間，國家主席習近平及國務院總理李強，將會與默茨舉行會談，就雙邊關係和共同關心的問題，交換意見。



編輯 :羅宇光

title: 財政預算案｜提速推進北都發展　採用「片區」模式批地
Paul Chan delivers 2026-27 budget speech
news_content:
Financial Secretary Paul Chan on Wednesday delivered his 2026-27 budget speech to the Legislative Council.

Chan started by saying that over the past year, favourable economic and capital market conditions have boosted tax revenues. 

He said the government's enhanced fiscal consolidation programme has yielded tangible results, so Hong Kong's public finances have improved faster than expected. 

Chan said annual operating accounts have returned to surplus, therefore, the government can increase support for the public, and small and medium-sized enterprises, to a reasonable extent.
 
He said the SAR will adopt innovative thinking to align with the country's 15th Five-Year Plan, nurturing new productive forces tailored to local conditions. 

Chan said the city must leverage its strengths to attract talent and empower enterprises to explore new markets. 

He said he anticipates that Hong Kong's economy will maintain its positive momentum throughout this year.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 財政預算案｜ 2027年至2030年平均每年實質經濟增長3%
財政預算案｜ 政府預測今年香港經濟增長2.5%至3.5%
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波表示，去年全年整體經濟增幅3.5%，連續3年上升。綜合對目前環球和本地經濟形勢的研判，當局預測今年香港經濟增長2.5%至3.5%，今年基本通脹率和整體通脹率分別為1.7%和1.8%。至於本港經濟在2027年至2030年間，預測平均每年實質增長3%，基本通脹率為平均每年2%。

陳茂波發表新一份財政預算案，他表示踏入2026年，全球貿易緊張局勢略為緩和，主要經濟體的經濟活動維持擴張。內地經濟將為全球經濟增長帶來最大貢獻，國家今年將實施更積極有為的宏觀政策，持續擴大內需，紮實推動高質量發展，保持經濟合理增長，為「十五五」時期奠定良好開局，亦為香港經濟增長創造有利條件。

陳茂波表示，AI等新科技的投資繼續帶動相關產品需求，支持亞洲貿易活動進一步擴張。市場普遍預期美國息口會再下調，有助提振投資信心。國際貨幣基金組織預測今年環球經濟溫和增長。

他表示，受惠有關因素，香港貨物出口預料會保持可觀增長；服務輸出亦因訪港旅客數目及金融服務需求上升而繼續增加，內需有望穩步增長。

至於勞工市場平穩及市民收入上升，將推動私人消費；營商氣氛改善，以及減息預期，均利好資產市場及投資活動。不過，陳茂波說，國際大環境錯綜複雜，主要先進經濟體反覆的經貿政策，繼續為全球貿易帶來不確定性。倘若美國減息步伐較預期慢，現時環球金融市場的樂觀情緒或會受影響。



編輯：黃佩珊

title: Kwun Tong police officer found dead at station
news_content:
Police said a 23-year-old female police officer assigned to the patrol sub-unit of Kwun Tong district was found dead at Kwun Tong Police Station on Wednesday morning. 

Her body was discovered around 7.45am in the station's loading and unloading area.

According to police, the officer was pronounced dead at the scene and a service pistol was found next to her. 

Officers said initial investigations suggest she died from a self-inflicted gunshot wound after using her issued firearm.

Authorities stated that a post-mortem examination will be conducted to determine the exact cause of death. 

The case is currently being investigated by the regional crime unit of Kowloon East.

Police expressed deep sorrow and regret over the incident and extended their condolences to the officer's family.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 財政預算案｜陳茂波：稅收增加　預期今年香港經濟勢頭持續良好
警方調查指觀塘警署23歲女警疑以佩槍自殺　現場證實死亡
news_content:
警方東九龍總區重案組正調查一名女警上午在觀塘警署死亡的案件。

警方表示，這名女警23歲，隸屬觀塘警區軍裝巡邏小隊。上午約7時45分，警方發現她在觀塘警署上彈及退彈區域內受傷，頭部有槍傷，現場證實死亡，身旁有一把佩槍。警方經初步調查，相信女警用獲發的佩槍自殺。

警方稍後將安排為死者進行驗屍，以確定死因。警方表示，對事件深表難過及惋惜，並對該名警務人員的家屬致以慰問，會提供適切協助。



編輯：譚佩貞

news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波發表新一份財政預算案，民建聯副主席、立法會議員陳恒鑌在本台節目《議政四方》，分享他對預算案的期望，包括振興市道和「派糖」。



編輯：汪溟曦

news_content:
工聯會副理事長、立法會議員鄧家彪在今集《議政四方》，談及他對新一份財政預算案意見，包括惠民紓困措施、保障勞工權益等方面的建議。

title: TKO line hit by longer rush-hour commutes
news_content:
The MTR Corporation on Wednesday warned of longer journey times during morning peak hours on the Tseung Kwan O Line due to problems with platform screen doors at North Point Station.

That followed an announcement shortly before 9am that the doors were not operating smoothly.

Some of the doors had to be operated manually, slowed down trains at North Point station.

Journey times between the station and Po Lam and Lohas Park stops were longer by five to eight minutes.

The problem was fixed about an hour later, and services have gradually returned to normal since then.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 特朗普發表國情咨文　稱美國比以往更美好富裕及強大
news_content:
美國總統特朗普到國會發表國情咨文。他在國情咨文的開首形容，美國已經重新振作，比以往任何時候，都更加美好、富裕及強大。

特朗普提到，不足5個月後，美國將慶祝國家史上一個具里程碑意義的盛事，就是美國獨立250周年紀念日，美國將會做得越來越好，這是美國的黃金時代。

特朗普又指，通貨膨脹正在急劇下降，在過去的12個月，他的政府已將核心通脹，降至超過5年以來的最低水平。他又提到，已收到超過8000萬桶來自委內瑞拉的石油。


編輯：羅宇光

title: 日股半日升逾1.4%
news_content:
日股造好，盤中創新高。日經指數一度升逾900點，高見58227點，半日收報58145點，升823點，升幅1.44%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: HK stocks open up as regional chipmakers lead gains
news_content:
Asia's financial markets were higher on Wednesday with ‌South Korean chipmakers leading gains as investors doubled down on what they saw as the safest bet on artificial intelligence and the yen remained in focus.

In Hong Kong, the benchmark Hang Seng Index opened 154 points, or 0.58 percent, up at 26,745.

The China enterprises index was 61 points, or 0.7 percent, higher at 9,069 while the tech index was 45 points, or 0.9 percent, higher at 5,316.

On the mainland, the benchmark Shanghai Composite Index opened up just over six points, or 0.15 percent, at 4,123.

The Shenzhen Component Index was just over 30 points, or 0.21 percent, higher at 14,322.

The ChiNext Index, tracking China's Nasdaq-style board of growth enterprises, was up 0.15 percent at 3,313.

Investors rocked by volatility in recent months were also awaiting US President Donald Trump's State of the Union speech on Tuesday in Washington. Market participants are bracing for comments that could touch on policies from trade to affordability to Iran.

MSCI's broadest index of Asia-Pacific shares outside ⁠Japan was 1 percent higher in early trading.

Japan's Nikkei set a record high. It was up 1.1 percent at 57,956 in early trade after touching an intraday peak of 58,047. The broader Topix edged up 0.07 percent to 3,818.

In Seoul, the Kospi was nearly 1.7 percent higher to trade above 6,000 for the first time. The index is up 44 percent so far this year.

A global memory chip shortage has seen Samsung Electronics and SK Hynix stock prices double since October, as cash has surged up the AI supply chain to the enormously popular chipmakers. Leading global chipmaker Nvidia Corp reports its fourth-quarter results after the US market close on Wednesday.

Australia's S&P/ASX200 was up as much as 1.1 percent to a record high despite higher consumer prices ⁠in January that increased the risk of more interest rate hikes.

The yen strengthened 0.12 percent against the greenback to 155 per ⁠dollar on Wednesday, after dropping by 0.8 percent ⁠on Tuesday.

A news report said Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi had conveyed her reservations about further interest rate hikes to Bank of Japan governor Kazuo Ueda, raising doubts over the next rate increase. (Reuters & Xinhua)


Edited by Edmond Fong

title: 港鐵將軍澳綫列車服務逐步回復正常
news_content: 港鐵表示，北角站3號月台幕門設備已完成復修，將軍澳綫列車服務逐步回復正常。

title: 《環看天下》：德總理默茨訪華　分析：競爭與衝突之間尋求平衡
news_content:
應國務院總理李強邀請，德國總理默茨今日起一連兩日對中國進行正式訪問，據報行程包括在北京出席德中經濟顧問委員會座談會，並與中國領導人會晤。

默茨是今年繼加拿大總理卡尼，以及英國首相施紀賢後，另一位訪華的西方國家領袖。

德國近年既視中國為合作伙伴，亦是競爭對手。外界關注，默茨如何透過此行闡述德國立場，尋求在兩者之間取得平衡。

title: US starts collecting 10-percent global import tariff
news_content:
The United States began collecting a temporary new 10 percent global import tariff on Tuesday, but the Trump administration was working to increase it to 15 percent, a White House official said, sowing confusion over President Donald Trump's tariff policies after last week's Supreme Court defeat.

Trump initially signed an order on Friday for a 10 percent tariff to last 150 days to replace broad duties under an emergency law that were ⁠struck down by the Supreme Court, but on Saturday, he said he would increase the rate to 15 percent.

On Monday night, before the midnight start of collections, the US Customs and Border Protection agency notified shippers that the rate would be 10 percent.

The White House official told Reuters that Trump has had "no change of heart" in his desire for a 15 percent tariff under Section 122 of the Trade Act of 1974, but offered no details on the timing for that increase.

As of Monday, Trump had not signed a formal presidential order for the increase to 15 percent and CBP can only act on published presidential executive orders and proclamations. CBP's notice referred to his Friday order, saying that aside from products covered by exemptions, imports would "be subject to an additional ad valorem rate of 10 percent."

The move added to confusion surrounding US trade policy, with no explanation offered in the notice for why the lower rate had been used.

"Trump is delivering the State of the Union address tonight, so it's possible we ⁠might get a better sense of the next steps on tariffs," Deutsche Bank said in a note. 

"Net-net we still think the effective tariff rate will ⁠fall this year and that the world post-Scotus ⁠will see lower tariffs than the pre-Scotus world," its analysts said, using the acronym for the Supreme Court of the United States.

The new tariff took effect at midnight, while collection of the tariffs annulled by the Supreme Court was halted. They had ranged from 10 percent to as much as 50 percent.

The plaintiffs who prevailed in the Supreme Court tariff case filed motions on Tuesday in federal courts to enforce the ruling and initiate a process for refunds.

The Liberty Justice Centre said it and co-counsel Neal Katyal filed coordinated motions in the US Court of International Trade in New York and the ⁠US Court of Appeals for the Federal Circuit in Washington seeking immediate issuance of a mandate to return the case to CIT and to order the government to issue directives to refund the tariffs with interest.

The Supreme Court remanded the case to the lower courts to sort out any refunds.

Reuters has reported that more than US$175 billion in federal revenue was collected from the now-invalid tariffs under the 1977 International Emergency Economic Powers Act, based on an estimate from the Penn-Wharton Budget Model.

The new 10 percent tariff represents a conundrum ⁠for the European Union, which agreed  to a trade deal with a 15 percent base tariff rate.

European Commission Trade Minister Maros Sefcovic said the bloc faces a "transitional period"  over Trump's new temporary tariff, but added US trade officials have reassured him Washington will stand by the agreement.

It remains unclear whether and how companies will be refunded for tariff payments made under the program annulled by the Supreme Court.

The Section 122 law allows the president to impose the new duties for up to 150 days to address "large and serious" balance-of-payments deficits and "fundamental international payments problems."

Trump's tariff order argued that a serious balance-of-payments deficit existed in the form of a US$1.2 trillion annual US goods trade deficit, a current account deficit of 4 percent of GDP and a reversal of the US primary income surplus.

But some economists and trade lawyers argue the US is not on the cusp of a balance-of-payments crisis, making the new duties vulnerable to a legal ⁠challenge.

China has urged Washington to abandon its "unilateral tariffs," indicating it was willing to hold another round of trade talks with Washington, the commerce ministry said in a statement on Tuesday. (Reuters)



Edited by Cecil Wong

title: Tech shares rebound as markets weigh AI impacts
news_content:
Tech shares bounced on Tuesday following the prior session's sell-off as markets weigh the impact of artificial intelligence on incumbent technology companies while navigating tariff uncertainty.

After losing more than one percent on Monday, major US indices began tentatively on Tuesday before catching their stride later in the morning. The tech-rich Nasdaq led Wall Street indices with a one-percent gain, while the Dow and S&P 500 also finished solidly higher.

"Today tech is really catching a break from the AI disruption narrative," said Angelo Kourkafas of Edward Jones, who also pointed to a big Meta deal secured by semiconductor company AMD.

"Both of these developments and news headlines on the tech space are helping recover some of yesterday's losses," Kourkafas said.

Besides AI, markets have been assimilating the after-effects of the Supreme Court's move last week to strike down many of US President Donald Trump's tariffs.

Right after the ruling, Trump announced new levies at 10 percent, under a different legal authority. Trump has vowed to raise this level to 15 percent, with exclusions expected to remain for goods covered by sector-specific arrangements and the US-Mexico-Canada trade pact.

However, the move has raised questions about other trade deals Washington has agreed since Trump's tariff blitz in April, with the European Union demanding clarity on the issue before ratifying its agreement with the United States.

Trump is scheduled to address Congress in the annual State of the Union speech on Tuesday night that will likely include discussion of tariffs and other economic issues.

The market's Jekyll-and-Hyde attitude towards AI shifted on Tuesday after an announcement that tech giant Meta had reached an agreement to purchase millions of chips from processor manufacturer AMD, in which it could become a shareholder.

Shares in AMD jumped 8.8 percent, while Meta rose 0.3 percent.

Sentiment had been dampened by renewed concerns about the impact of artificial intelligence on the tech sector, with software firms again in the firing line.

The latest blow came from a report on Sunday by Citrini Research that used possible scenarios set in the future showing parts of the global economy that could be at risk from new tools, such as credit card and food delivery firms.

But investors adopted a more sanguine view of the situation on Tuesday following a presentation by AI company Anthropic that emphasised the compatibility of its technology with existing programmes, analysts said.

"The reality is that these new AI tools will not rip and replace existing software ecosystems and data environments," said a note from Wedbush Securities, noting that the tools were only as useful as the data they could use.

"AI is more likely to drive a modernisation cycle than bypass the installed base."

Shares in Danish drugmaker Novo Nordisk, which is struggling with competition for its anti-obesity treatments, fell 3.1 percent after it announced it would sharply cut prices for its flagship drugs in the US, announcing a 50-percent cut for Wegovy and 35 percent for Ozempic.

The S&P 500 rose 0.8 percent, to 6,890, the Dow also rose 0.8 percent, to 49,174, while the Nasdaq rose 1 percent, to 22,863. (AFP)



Edited by Cecil Wong

title: US consumer confidence rises in February
news_content:
US consumer confidence has improved in February despite persistent affordability worries and lingering unease over the labour market, according to survey data released on Tuesday.

After sinking in January amid cost-of-living pressures, the Conference Board's consumer confidence index rose by 2.2 points in February to 91.2, according to preliminary survey results through mid-month.

"Confidence ticked up in February after falling in January, as consumers' pessimistic expectations for the future eased somewhat," said Conference Board Chief Economist Dana Peterson, adding that the level is still "well-below" a four-year peak from November 2024.

Consumer confidence is closely watched in the United States, where consumer spending accounts for more than two-thirds of GDP. However, in recent years retail sales have sometimes surprised to the upside given downcast readings in terms of sentiment.

Some of the sub-components in Tuesday's reports pointed in opposite directions.

For example, while more people described jobs as "plentiful" compared with January, there was also an uptick in the number of people characterising work as "hard to get."

But the outlook for six months in the future improved from the January readings in terms of how consumers see business conditions, the labour market and their income prospects.

The report indicates consumers are "still concerned about the economy, but they no longer think it's getting worse," said Heather Long, chief economist at Navy Federal Credit Union.

"American consumers are frustrated about high prices and a lack of job opportunities, but the vibes are no longer getting worse," Long said. 

"February was the first uptick in sentiment in half a year and it's notable that more people said they are considering buying a big-ticket item in the coming months." (AFP)



Edited by Robert Kemp

title: Meta, AMD agree to major AI chips deal
news_content:
American tech giant Meta has reached an agreement to purchase millions of powerful AI chips from processor manufacturer AMD, in which it could become a major shareholder, the two companies announced on Tuesday.

The Facebook and Instagram giant is on a massive spending spree as it battles to keep up with Google, OpenAI and Microsoft in the generative AI race sparked by the release of ChatGPT in 2022.

Meta's deal with AMD comes only days after the company led by Mark Zuckerberg said it had agreed to deploy millions of processors over the next few years from AMD rival Nvidia.

The five largest US cloud and AI infrastructure providers – Microsoft, Alphabet, Amazon, Meta, and Oracle – have collectively committed to spending more than US$650 billion on capital expenditure in 2026, nearly doubling 2025 levels.

AMD has committed to supplying Meta with up to six gigawatts worth of graphics processing units (GPUs), chips fundamental to powering artificial intelligence. AMD's stock jumped 6.5 percent at opening on Wall Street.

No dollar figure was provided in the joint communique, but the transactions represent a "double-digit" amount in billions of dollars, AMD CEO Lisa Su told analysts, according to Bloomberg.

"We're excited to form a long-term partnership with AMD to deploy efficient inference compute and deliver personal superintelligence," said Mark Zuckerberg, founder and CEO of Meta. "I expect AMD to be an important partner for many years to come."

In addition, AMD issued Meta a financial option that can be converted to shares that would make the social media giant a major shareholder if the chip company hits certain performance benchmarks in the coming years.

The Meta deal follows other major AI partnerships AMD has been striking as it seeks to gain ground on Nvidia, the AI chip powerhouse.

In October 2025, AMD and ChatGPT-maker OpenAI announced a very similar multibillion-dollar partnership, with OpenAI committing to purchasing six gigawatts worth of AMD chips.

Meta's doubling-down on AI is seen by some investors as a riskier bet than that of other tech giants.

Unlike Amazon, Microsoft, and Google, Meta doesn't have a cloud service and lacks a direct revenue stream tied to its AI investments. Meta says it benefits from AI through improved performance in its core digital ads business via better targeting.

The company has also been releasing AI features such as AI characters on its world-leading platforms, but in January Meta said it was temporarily suspending teenager access to them as it perfected the products. (AFP)



Edited by Robert Kemp

title: 澤連斯基料烏美俄10天內再次會談　普京批敵方製造挑釁
news_content:
俄烏戰爭爆發四周年，烏克蘭總統澤連斯基說，預計烏克蘭、美國、俄羅斯的三方會談，可能在一星期至10天內舉行。他認為最重要的是結束戰爭、並獲得真正的安全保障，而不是形式上的停火。

歐盟及歐洲多國的領導人到訪烏克蘭首都基輔，歐盟委員會主席馮德萊恩說，將繼續支持烏克蘭加入歐盟的進程。

俄羅斯聯邦對外情報局較早時表示，有情報顯示，英國和法國正在研究向烏克蘭提供核武器。俄羅斯總統普京批評敵方不惜一切代價製造挑釁，企圖破壞談判取得的成果。

俄羅斯總統新聞秘書佩斯科夫就說，俄羅斯仍然對繼續推進烏克蘭問題和平進程，持開放態度。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 澤連斯基料烏美俄或一周至十天內再會談　普京批敵方製造挑釁
news_content:
俄烏戰爭爆發四周年。烏克蘭總統澤連斯基說，預計烏克蘭、美國、俄羅斯的三方會談，可能在一星期至十天內舉行。他認為最重要的是結束戰爭、並獲得真正的安全保障，而不是形式上的停火。

歐盟及歐洲多國的領導人到訪烏克蘭首都基輔，歐盟委員會主席馮德萊恩說，將繼續支持烏克蘭加入歐盟的進程。

俄羅斯聯邦對外情報局較早時表示，有情報顯示，英國和法國正在研究向烏克蘭提供核武器。俄羅斯總統普京批評敵方不惜一切代價製造挑釁，企圖破壞談判取得的成果。

克里姆林宮發言人佩斯科夫就說，俄羅斯仍然對繼續推進烏克蘭問題和平進程，持開放態度。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 大南街有留學生宿舍疑因充電器過熱起火　8人不適送院
news_content:
大南街一座大廈發生火警，8人不適送院，警方初步調查相信，火警是充電器過熱引致。

警方表示，事發在凌晨2時許，大南街39號一間用作留學生宿舍的大廈起火，消防到場後將火救熄，期間約33人自行疏散。

7男1女吸入濃煙不適，年齡介乎17至19歲，分別清醒送往伊利沙伯醫院、廣華醫院及明愛醫院治理。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 大南街學生公寓懷疑有充電器過熱起火　8人不適送院
news_content:
大南街一間學生公寓發生火警，8人不適送院，警方初步調查相信，火警是充電器過熱引致。

事發在凌晨2時許，大南街39號一間出租予學生的公寓起火，消防到場後將火救熄，期間約33人自行疏散。

7男1女吸入濃煙不適，年齡介乎17至19歲，分別清醒送往伊利沙伯醫院、廣華醫院及明愛醫院治理。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 大南街有留學生宿舍疑因充電器過熱起火　8人不適送院
news_content:
大南街一座大廈發生火警，8人不適送院，警方初步調查相信，火警是充電器過熱引致。

警方表示，事發在凌晨2時許，大南街39號一間用作留學生宿舍的大廈起火，消防到場後將火救熄，期間約33人自行疏散。

7男1女吸入濃煙不適，年齡介乎17至19歲，分別清醒送往伊利沙伯醫院、廣華醫院及明愛醫院治理。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 德國總理默茨訪華兩天　表示期待探討進一步拓展兩國合作
news_content:
德國總理默茨今天起正式訪問中國兩日，是他就任總理以來首次訪華。

默茨啟程時表示，德中兩國過去幾十年的合作經驗豐富，他此行將會探討進一步拓展兩國之間的合作。

默茨又說，競爭能夠促進商業發展，但前提是必須公平、透明，雙方都必須遵守共同制定的規則。

默茨又說，今天大約中午，會在北京人民大會堂與總理李強會面；下午將在釣魚台國賓館，與國家主席習近平會面。

默茨明天會轉到杭州訪問，他表示期待了解中國在人工智能等領域的發展，並探討能夠為德國經濟帶來的機遇。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 烏克蘭制裁俄羅斯29名個人和15個機構
news_content:
俄烏戰爭爆發四周年，烏克蘭總統澤連斯基簽署法令，制裁俄羅斯29名個人和15個機構。

烏方表示，被制裁的人員包括俄方任命的赫爾松州文化部長拉戈伊斯基，又說今次被制裁的俄羅斯機構，涉及支持對烏克蘭的軍事行動，包括從克里米亞的博物館竊取文化遺產，挪用烏克蘭國家檔案館的文件。

烏克蘭外交部同日發表聲明，說烏方希望結束戰爭、恢復和平，烏克蘭人民理應得到有尊嚴的和平與安全保障，呼籲合作夥伴在武器、資金、國防生產等方面提供支援。

俄羅斯總統新聞秘書佩斯科夫就說，俄方立場明確、一致，仍然願意透過政治和外交方式，實現特別軍事行動的目標。佩斯科夫又說，俄方希望關於烏克蘭問題的會談能夠繼續，但新一輪會談的時間和地點尚未得到確定。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 阿富汗與巴基斯坦昨日下午在邊境地區短暫交火
news_content:
阿富汗與巴基斯坦昨日下午在邊境地區短暫交火。

阿富汗國防部副發言人努斯拉特表示，巴基斯坦軍隊人員昨日下午在兩國邊境地區，向當時正在例行巡邏的阿富汗人員開火，雙方一度爆發衝突，局勢目前已經回復正常。

巴基斯坦日前向阿富汗境內的武裝份子發動空襲，稱是打擊兩國邊境地區的恐怖份子據點，以回應巴基斯坦近期一系列自殺式炸彈襲擊；阿富汗政府表示襲擊造成幾十人死傷，批評巴方以犯罪行為彌補安全漏洞。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 內地9天春節假期　國內遊客人數和花費均創新高
news_content:
內地9天春節假期期間，國內遊客人數和花費均創新高。

文化和旅遊部公布，9天假期期間全國國內超過5億人次出遊，比去年的春節假日增加接近1億人次；國內出遊總花費超過8千億元人民幣，亦多過去年。

民航局的數據顯示，假期期間全國民航累計發送超過2200萬人次旅客，航班正常率超過95%；熱門機場包括廣州白雲、上海浦東、深圳寶安、北京首都、成都天府等。

入境旅客方面，當局表示，韓國、越南、俄羅斯等國家的來華旅客增幅較大。內地旅遊網站的數據顯示，春節期間使用非中國護照預訂國內航班的數量，同比增長兩成。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 澳門內地9天春節長假期間　錄得破紀錄日均客量17.3萬人次
news_content:
澳門在內地9天春節長假期間，錄得日均客量17.3萬人次，是有紀錄以來最高。

根據澳門酒店業界提供的資料，在春節黄金周期間，酒店業場所的平均入住率超過95%，其中年初四最高、有99.2%。

澳門旅遊局表示，政府與業界及社團，在農曆新年期間舉辦的連串慶祝活動，令全城洋溢慶節氛圍，各部門亦加強與業界的協調溝通，保障旅遊服務質素，持續鞏固澳門作為理想旅遊休閒目的地的形象。

在這段期間，澳門錄得155.4萬人次旅客入境，同比去年上升5.5個百分點。當中內地旅客有120.6萬人次，國際旅客7.1萬人次，都分別較去年春節黄金周的日均量增加了約7個和8個百分點。而年初三單日錄得近22.8萬人次入境旅客，是澳門有正式統計數據以來的最高單日旅客量。

而旅遊局在春節黄金周共接獲30宗旅客投訴，分別涉及酒店預訂、房間衛生、服務態度及景點等，亦接獲2宗涉及懷疑非法提供住宿的投訴，已轉介相關部門處理。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 伊朗革命衛隊地面部隊舉行軍演　運用新型武器進行精準火力打擊
news_content:
伊朗革命衛隊地面部隊昨日在南部舉行軍演，試驗新技術和多層次火力部署。

伊朗傳媒報道，今次軍事演習在南部地區和波斯灣島嶼舉行，目的是維護南部沿海地區的安全。演習的特點之一，是運用新型武器進行精準火力打擊，並結合現代技術在不同層面實施聯合戰術。

另外英國《金融時報》報道，如果美國決定對伊朗採取大規模軍事行動，估計以美軍目前的軍事能力，只能維持大約4至5天的高強度空襲，或大約一星期的低強度打擊。

報道引述專家和官員說，如果美國對伊朗發起新的打擊、或爆發大規模衝突，伊朗可能會對地區的美軍資產、美國盟友及能源基礎設施實施報復。



編輯：盧曉珊

title: 古爾斯比：更多證據表明通脹正回落前不宜減息
news_content:
芝加哥聯儲銀行總裁古爾斯比表示，在有更多證據表明通脹正在回落之前，不宜進行減息。

他指，鑒於近期指標顯示通脹雖已遠低於高位，但仍高過聯儲局2%的目標。政策制定者過去曾因認為通脹是暫時性而吃虧，不應再犯同樣的錯誤。

他認為，在這種情況下過早大幅減息是不明智，當局會繼續關注物價，並在進一步減息刺激經濟之前，確保通脹正回到2%的水平。

古爾斯比指出，3%的通脹率仍高於聯儲局目標，停滯在相關水平並非安全之地。



編輯：張詩民

title: 美國2月消費者信心好過預期
news_content:
世界大型企業研究會公布，美國2月消費者信心指數報91.2，高過市場預期的87。



編輯：張詩民

title: 美股初段上升　市場繼續關注美國關稅政策
news_content:
美股在開市初段上升，市場繼續關注美國關稅政策，總統特朗普將發表國情咨文。

道瓊斯指數較早時報49157點，升353點，升幅0.72%。

納斯達克指數報22691點，升64點，升幅0.28%。

標準普爾500指數報6849點，升11點，升幅0.17%。



編輯：張詩民

title: 美國去年12月樓價按年升1.8%　按月升0.1%
news_content:
美國聯邦住房金融局（FHFA）公布，美國去年12月樓價按年升1.8%，按月升0.1%。



編輯：張詩民

title: Scaffolding worker dies after fall from factory
news_content:
Labour authorities have launched an investigation into a fatal industrial accident in Tai Po where a worker fell to his death from the third floor of a building while erecting a bamboo scaffold. 

Police received a report at around 1.30pm on Tuesday that the 57-year-old man had plunged from support brackets onto the facade of a food factory on Dai Fu Street. He was rushed to hospital and was later certified dead. 

"We commenced an immediate on-site investigation as soon as we were notified of the accident and have issued suspension notices to the contractors concerned, suspending the erection, alteration, dismantling and use of bamboo scaffolds on the external wall of the building," a Labour Department spokesperson said. 

Maxim's Group, which operates the factory, confirmed that the man was a subcontracted worker and extended its condolences to the family of the deceased. 

The Association for the Rights of Industrial Accident Victims said it was deeply saddened, and urged frontline workers to ensure their own safety. It also called on employers to offer suitable equipment to protect those working at height.



Edited by Priscilla Ng

title: 勞工處高度關注大埔致命工業意外　已向承建商發暫時停工通知書
news_content:
大埔下午發生致命工業意外，一名男工人在工廈外牆搭建竹棚架時，懷疑從高處墮下，送院後證實不治，勞工處表示高度關注。

處方表示，已向有關承建商發出「暫時停工通知書」，停止在該大廈外牆搭建、更改、拆卸及使用竹棚架，直至處方信納已採取適當措施消除有關危害，才可復工。

發言人說，得知意外發生後，已即時派員到場調查，對於意外中有工人身故，表示十分難過，並向家屬致以深切慰問。

處方說，正全速調查以確定意外成因，查找有關持責者的法律責任，並提出改善措施，若發現有違例事項，定會依法處理。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 一批日本朱古力或含塑膠碎片　食安中心呼籲不要食用
news_content:
食物安全中心指，一批來源地是日本、名為「Furuta Doremi Song Chocolate」的預先包裝朱古力產品，指產品可能含有塑膠碎片，呼籲市民不要食用。

有關產品的批次編號為「2026.10/JG+FM」，每包122克，進口商是「萬通進出口貿易有限公司」，零售商是「APITA」 及「UNY」。

食安中心發言人說，日本當局發出通告指有關產品可能含有塑膠碎片，正進行回收，中心得悉事件後隨即聯絡本地主要進口商和零售商跟進，將受影響產品停售和下架，並展開回收。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 家得寶上季業績勝預期　因需求穩定
news_content:
家居裝飾連鎖店家得寶公布，上季盈利按年跌14%至25.7億美元，經調整每股盈利2.72美元，高過市場預期的2.54美元，受惠於需求穩定。

期內，收入跌約4%至約382億美元，但仍高過預期。同店銷售增長0.4%，客戶每宗交易平均消費額升2%至91.28美元。

公司預計，本財年經調整每股盈利按年持平至增長4%，收入增長約2.5%至4.5%，同店銷售按年持平至增長2%。

家得寶股價盤前升逾2%。



編輯：張詩民

title: Visitor numbers surge over Lunar New Year holiday
news_content:
Tourist arrivals during the Lunar New Year holiday rose about 14 percent to 1.77 million compared to a year ago, the government said on Tuesday, with a vast majority of travellers coming from the mainland. 

Official figures showed trips made by visitors from across the border reached 1.5 million between February 15 and 23, while the figure by tourists from elsewhere stood at 270,000. Mainland arrivals peaked on the second day of the Year of the Horse as some 210,000 visitors arrived in the city. 

Chief Secretary Eric Chan said the SAR was "filled with a festive atmosphere" during the holiday period that saw a number of celebratory events such as the float parade and fireworks display. 

"These diverse and enriching events were well received by both residents and visitors, not only creating a joyous atmosphere throughout the city but also effectively attracting crowds, stimulating consumption, and bringing opportunities to various industries such as retail, catering and tourism, showcasing Hong Kong's vibrant and welcoming metropolitan charm," Chan said in a statement.



Edited by Priscilla Ng

title: 政府暫停從部份受禽流感影響地區進口禽肉及禽類產品
news_content:
政府宣布，暫停丹麥、波蘭、美國和韓國部分地區的禽肉及禽類產品進口。

食物安全中心說，因應丹麥Næstved市、波蘭庫亞維─波美拉尼亞省Lipno區、美國密西西比州Amite縣、堪薩斯州Haskell縣和喬治亞州Hart縣爆發高致病性H5N1禽流感，以及韓國忠清南道保寧市爆發高致病性H5N9禽流感，已即時指示業界暫停從上述地區進口禽肉及禽蛋等禽類產品，以保障本港市民健康。

中心發言人說，已就事件聯絡丹麥、波蘭、美國和韓國當局，並會繼續密切留意世界動物衞生組織及有關當局公布的消息。

title: 商務部︰適時決定調整針對美方原芬太尼關稅和對等關稅措施
news_content:
商務部新聞發言人回應美國近期關稅調整措施，表示中方正密切關注並將全面評估美方相關舉措，後續將視情適時決定調整針對美方原芬太尼關稅和對等關稅的反制措施。中方將保留採取一切必要措施的權利，堅決捍衛自身合法權益。

發言人強調，中方一貫反對各種形式的單邊關稅措施，敦促美方取消並不再加徵有關單邊關稅。實踐已一再證明，中美雙方合則兩利，鬥則俱傷。中方願與美方在將於近期舉行的第6輪中美經貿磋商中開展坦誠磋商，希望美方與中方相向而行，在相互尊重、平等協商的基礎上，解決各自關切，妥善管控分歧，維護中美經貿關係健康、穩定、可持續發展。



編輯︰張萬燕

title: 立法會民政及文化體育事務委員會參觀啟德體育園
news_content:
立法會民政及文化體育事務委員會今日參觀啟德體育園，了解有關設施的最新運作情況。

參與活動的14名民政及文化體育事務委員會委員和非委員，在文化體育及旅遊局副局長劉震和體育專員蔡健斌的陪同下，先參觀啟德展館，聽取啟德體育園有限公司代表簡介園區整體規劃及核心設施，包括園區的設計理念、興建歷程、營運模式和願景。之後參觀啟德主場館，了解主場館的內部設計特色，並參觀中央廣場及戶外設施，觀賞以東方之珠為設計理念的啟德主場館外部建築；了解啟德青年運動場的設計特點與各項設施，亦參觀啟德體藝館。

議員於參觀期間，建議啟德體育園有限公司，持續優化泊車設施及行人通道，包括無障礙設施，以提升場館的暢達性和鼓勵社區參與。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 李強主持召開國務院常務會議　研究推進銀髮經濟和養老有關工作
news_content:
國務院總理李強主持召開國務院常務會議，對抓緊做好春節假期後政府工作作出部署。會議指出，今年是「十五五」開局之年，國務院各部門要進一步增強責任感緊迫感，瞄準全年目標任務，迅速進入工作狀態，推動黨中央各項決策部署落地見效。

會議研究推進銀髮經濟和養老服務發展有關工作，指出中國銀髮經濟潛力很大，要完善支持舉措、強化政策落實，促進養老事業和養老產業發展，為應對人口老齡化提供有力支撐。要進一步釋放銀髮消費需求，提升消費能力，發揮消費補貼等政策牽引作用，打造一批銀髮消費新場景新業態。



編輯︰張萬燕

title: 政府下月起按已更新建議　為合資格人士接種新冠疫苗加強劑
news_content:
衞生防護中心宣布，下月1日起，政府新冠疫苗接種計劃將會按已更新的高風險優先組別建議，為合資格人士接種加強劑，有關組別包括居於安老院舍的人士；65歲或以上居於社區的長者、50至64歲有長期病患的人士、6個月大或以上免疫力弱的人士及孕婦。

政府同日起會為12歲或以上合資格人士提供新冠LP.8.1信使核糖核酸疫苗，代替現時使用的新冠JN.1疫苗。

不屬於建議接種加強劑的高風險優先組別人士，例如18至49歲有長期病患的人士，以及50歲至64歲的健康人士，如果希望接種加強劑，中心建議諮詢家庭醫生有關私營市場可供應的已註冊新冠疫苗，並考慮自費接種有關疫苗作個人保護。

中心表示，新冠病毒的整體活躍程度目前雖然維持在低水平，但新冠病毒一般每約6至9個月會經歷一次活躍周期，本港距離上一次新冠活躍周期的完結已超過7個月，香港在未來幾個月有機會出現另一次活躍周期。市民應適時接種新冠疫苗，以減低感染新冠病毒後重症和死亡的風險。

現時在政府新冠疫苗接種計劃下，6個月大或以上人士可免費接種初始劑次，而優先組別人士不論過往已接種多少劑疫苗，於接種上一劑疫苗或感染新冠病毒最少6個月後，均可免費接種加強劑。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 洪丕正：今年開局表現良好　收入有望保持穩健增長
news_content:
渣打國際業務總裁洪丕正表示，今年開局表現良好，資本市場融資業務表現強勁，財富管理業務勢頭亦良好，對今年全年表現有信心，收入有望保持穩健增長，有形股本回報率有望進一步提升。

洪丕正說，目前環球利率走勢下行，但貸款及存款增長有助抵消息差的影響，估計今年淨利息收入表現與去年相若。

渣打香港兼大中華及北亞區行政總裁禤惠儀表示，香港商業房地產貸款敞口約15億美元，佔整體貸款組合不足2%，平均貸款價值比率（LTV）低於50%，認為有關貸款組合資產質素非常穩健。

她又說，香港經濟表現仍面對不確定性，但投資胃納改善，客戶亦更活躍，認為客戶已經準備好應對關稅的影響。

渣打前財務總監杜智高較早時因決定接受外部工作機會而離任，主席羅睿思說，董事會一直有為管理層繼任做好準備，正進行尋找繼任財務總監的工作，強調集團擁有強勁的內部管理團隊，會確保過渡順利。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 卓永興主持「地區治理專組」會議　討論關愛隊工作成果
news_content:
政務司副司長卓永興主持「地區治理專組」會議，討論關愛隊的工作成果，以及跟進提升地區設施、美化環境等方面工作。卓永興說，「專組」會繼續帶領部門以實際行動排解民生憂難，全面提升地區治理效能，建設更美好社區。

當局又表示，關愛隊去年10月已完成第一期服務，兩年間共探訪約61萬個長者戶及有需要住戶、提供近10萬次簡單家居或支援服務，以及舉辦約5萬項地區活動。當中，在大埔宏福苑火災的善後支援，有超過1900名來自全港18區的關愛隊隊員及義工迅速響應政府號召，積極參與緊急支援。

政府指出，關愛隊第一期的整體服務計劃總支出為4.44億元，當中共4.11億元、即92%的支出由政府承擔，餘下8%的支出由關愛隊凝聚社區資源所支付。政府撥備4.52億元作為第一期關愛隊的資助，最終關愛隊只使用當中的91%，並提供超越關鍵績效指標的服務要求，反映關愛隊恪守政府指引要求慎用公帑。


 
編輯：李俊傑

title: 黃金周期間訪港旅客約177萬人次　陳國基稱為不同行業帶來機遇
news_content:
一連九日內地春節黃金周昨日結束。由政務司司長陳國基領導的節慶安排跨部門工作小組表示，根據入境處數字，黃金周期間訪港旅客共有約177萬人次，較去年同期上升14%。內地訪港旅客共約150萬人次，非內地訪港旅客共約27萬人次，兩者同樣較去年上升14%。

工作小組指出，黃金周期間，平均每日內地旅客入境人次約17萬；內地旅客入境最高峰日子為2月18日、即年初二，約有21萬內地旅客人次訪港。期間最多內地旅客使用的入境口岸為高鐵西九龍，其次是落馬洲支線。整體口岸運作及交通維持暢順，秩序良好。

至於主要旅遊景點，工作小組表示，黃金周期間，漁護署在麥理浩徑第一、二段以及附近指定露營地點包括鹹田灣、西灣及浪茄灣的營地，共有32宗執法個案，包括亂拋垃圾、在指定燒烤地點或營地以外地方非法生火等。

工作小組說，在西貢東郊野公園有關熱門景點及露營地點，並無出現嚴重破壞問題，東壩一帶交通亦大致暢順。漁護署會參考黃金周的經驗，檢討長遠管理策略，包括引入預約和收費制度，更好管理人流。而黃金周共有約2400個內地入境旅行團、近84000人次訪港，過夜行程佔約74%，旅行團數目較去年八日春節黃金周上升約9%。期間酒店入住率普遍達到9成。

陳國基表示，今年春節黃金周期間，本港各區洋溢濃厚節日氣氛，豐富多元節慶活動廣受市民及旅客歡迎，有效帶動人流，刺激消費，為零售、餐飲、旅遊等不同行業帶來機遇。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 梁振英：警務及治安工作方面香港與內地需互相交流
news_content:
全國政協副主席、警察隊員佐級協會永遠名譽主席梁振英表示，近年本港治安形勢不斷發生變化，去年約有9萬宗罪案，騙案佔了一半，而網上騙案和演唱會門票網購騙案等亦有增加。

梁振英出席協會新春團拜致辭表示，以往內地省市會參考本港的警政工作，他認為香港和內地在警務工作、治安工作方面，已經不是內地單向香港學習及參考，而是香港與內地之間需要互相交流，雙互提高，內地有很多具體的做法非常值得香港參考。

警務處處長周一鳴出席同一活動致辭表示，本港去年的罪案數字較2024年下跌，科技的協助，例如「銳眼」計劃及無人機等，成效有目共睹，但警務人員的專業精神及付出是關鍵，亦是無可取代。他提到，包括1月發生的屯門持刀襲擊案、巨額日圓劫案，警方迅速破案，都反映警隊在處理突發及嚴重罪件，有非常高的水平。最近另一宗受關注的國安案件黎智英案的裁決，除了彰顯法治和公義，更突顯警隊作為維護國家安全先鋒的決心和能力。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 美心集團對外判工人去世感悲痛　將提供一切可能協助
news_content:
大埔發生工業意外，一名58歲工人懷疑從高處墮下，送院後不治。

現場是大埔工業邨大富街美心食品廠，警方下午約1時半接報，指有工人由大約3層樓高的棚架墮下，送院後證實不治。勞工處表示，處方接報後已即時派員到現場，並就意外原因展開調查。

美心集團表示，一名外判公司工人在美心食品廠外牆搭設棚架時墮下，事發後廠方即時報警並召喚救護車。集團對這名外判工人去世感到深切悲痛，正配合警方及勞工署調查，將與外判公司及死者家屬保持緊密溝通。集團向死者家屬致以最深切的慰問，並將提供一切可能的協助。

工業傷亡權益會表示，對事件深感難過，職員已到醫院，希望向家屬提供援助。會方呼籲施工地盤和前線工友，長假期前後提高警覺，開工前必須檢查棚架及相關工作設備，確保安全可用。從事棚架高空工作者，僱主必須提供並監察正確使用合適防墮裝備，包括全身式安全帶及繫於穩固點的獨立救生繩等。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 增設「銳眼」鏡頭涉逾40億元開支　鄧炳強：全無「水分」
news_content:
警方於罪案較高及人流較多的公眾地方安裝閉路的「銳眼計劃」，現時已安裝共約5000支閉路電視鏡頭，第二階段預計於2028年有共約6萬支鏡頭覆蓋全港，並計劃在2028至2031年展開第三階段，額外增加約6500支鏡頭，預計在2026/27至2031/32年度，涉及合共逾40億元的非經常開支。

保安局局長鄧炳強在立法會保安事務委員會會議上指，過去一兩年已經做了大量工作，形容以「超壓縮」的方式根據市場情況計算開支，已經是全無「水分」。

鄧炳強又指基於地緣政治風險評估，並考慮到潛在的中長期供應鏈及資訊保安風險，建議採用直接購買方式採購。




編輯：梁家奇

title: 戴思勁明日起接替張錦慧出任民事法律專員
news_content:
​律政司宣布，副民事法律專員戴思勁將於明日起接替張錦慧出任民事法律專員。張錦慧同日開始退休前休假。

律政司司長林定國歡迎有關任命，表示戴思勁是具卓越專業能力和領導才能的資深官員，深信他能領導民事法律科迎接未來挑戰，繼續為香港提供專業和優質的服務。同時感謝張錦慧盡忠職守，在任內作出寶貴貢獻。

戴思勁於2002年在香港取得律師資格，同年獲委任為政府律師，2019年擢升為首席政府律師，在律政司民事法律科服務逾20年，於2022年至2024年在律政司司長辦公室轄下的法治建設辦公室工作。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 【重溫】2026年2月24日新聞天地
news_content: 詳盡報道本地時事、大中華消息、國際局勢等新聞，緊貼最新熱話。

title: 王毅：中方願同各國一道完善全球人權治理
news_content:
中共中央政治局委員、外長王毅，周一以視像方式，出席在瑞士日內瓦舉行的聯合國人權理事會高級別會議，並發表講話。

王毅表示，當前國際形勢錯綜複雜，國家主席習近平去年9月提出全球治理倡議，已得到150多個國家及國際組織支持響應，中方願同各國一道以落實全球治理倡議為契機，完善全球人權治理，促進國際人權事業健康發展。

王毅又強調，中國願同各國一起促進共同發展繁榮，捍衛國際公平正義，弘揚全人類共同價值，構建人類命運共同體，讓人權文明的發展進步造福全世界。



編輯：梁家奇

title: 港鐵荃灣綫3月15日起使用新信號系統
news_content:
港鐵宣布，將在下月15日起在荃灣綫使用新信號系統，預計會有磨合期，或對荃灣綫列車服務有不同程度影響。

港鐵說，已經制定應變方案，包括在沿綫車站加派人手，亦會保留現有的信號系統。



編輯：梁家奇

title: 外交部：在巴拿馬港口問題上立場明確　將堅決維護企業正當合法權
news_content:
在北京，外交部回應，巴拿馬政府強行接管長和集團營運的兩個港口，重申中方在巴拿馬有關港口問題上的立場是明確的，中方將堅決維護企業的正當合法權益。

商務及經濟發展局局長丘應樺就事件向巴拿馬駐港總領事提出嚴正抗議。特區政府發言人重申，巴拿馬最高法院早前裁定巴拿馬港口公司經營的兩個巴拿馬港口違憲一事，完全是罔顧事實，背信棄義。巴拿馬政府強行接管兩個港口，嚴重損害香港企業的合法權益和違反合約精神。特區政府對此粗暴行徑予以譴責。

長和就說，當地政府撤銷巴拿馬港口公司特許經營權並強行接管兩個貨櫃碼頭屬不合法，將繼續諮詢法律顧問意見，研究所有可行途徑。




編輯：梁家奇

title: 李家超：「經貿一站通」將協助港企開拓海外商機
news_content:
行政長官李家超出席香港中華總商會春節酒會。他表示，在新一年，他會帶領特區政府主動對接國家「十五五」規劃，除了主動招攬內地企業利用香港「出海」，亦會成立新的「經貿一站通」協助香港的中小企和初創企業，開拓海外商機。

他又表示，特區政府會利用優惠政策，吸引更多具有極高發展潛力的企業落戶香港，以它們拉動整體經濟生生不息地發展。


編輯：梁家奇

title: 自動駕駛車輛測試路段延伸至東涌及欣澳
news_content:
運輸署更新一個自動駕駛車輛先導牌照，延伸北大嶼山的自動車測試路段，從現有機場島延至東涌市中心及欣澳，總長度增至43.2公里。

運輸署形容，本港自動車技術測試進展顯著，正研究容許以試點形式提供商業營運服務，以及推動試運行李，連接高鐵站和機場快綫，未來會考慮推動跨境通行測試。



編輯：梁家奇

title: 商務部將多家日本實體列入出口管制管控及關注名單
news_content:
在北京，商務部宣布把三菱造船株式會社等20家日本實體，列入出口管制管控名單，並將斯巴魯株式會社、東京科學大學等20家日本實體列入關注名單。

商務部發言人說，相關措施僅針對少數日本實體及兩用物項，不影響中日正常經貿往來，誠信守法的日本實體完全毋須擔心。

外交部發言人表示，為了維護國家安全和利益、履行防擴散等國際義務，中方依法依規採取措施，目的是制止日本「再軍事化」和擁核企圖，完全正當、合理、合法。



編輯：梁家奇

title: 消防處已就宏福苑火災向獨立委員會遞交文件
news_content:
消防處已經就大埔宏福苑火災向獨立委員會遞交文件，消防處處長楊恩健說，當中包括巡查紀錄，以及行動資料；他相信一定數量的消防人員需出席聽證會，或應委員會要求，去講解相關滅火救援行動及防火巡查，處方會全力配合委員會調查。

楊恩健在消防處的年結記者會上，展望今年工作重點，包括計劃修例，加強監察消防系統及設備管理等，預計4月至5月向立法會保安事務委員會簡介修例內容。




編輯：梁家奇

title: 國泰航空和香港快運1月載客量按年升11%
news_content:
國泰公布，國泰航空和香港快運1月合共接載逾330萬人次，按年升11%。

期內，國泰航空載客量逾262萬人次，按年增長11.5%。運載率84.9%，按年下跌1.5個百分點。可用座位公里數按年增加14%。受惠海外留學生客流，以及年末假期後返程旅客帶動，需求在1月上旬保持穩健。

香港快運1月載客量近71.8萬人次，按年增長7.6%。運載率81.1%，按年跌3.5個百分點。可用座位公里數則增加13%。

集團指，2月14日國泰航空及國泰集團雙雙創下單日載客量新高，國泰航空史上首次單日載客量突破十萬人次，連同香港快運，當日集團合共接載約12.8萬名乘客。集團預計，復活節假期整體出行需求仍然殷切，航班訂座率料會隨出發日期臨近而進一步攀升。

貨運方面，1月載貨量按年升5%至13.7萬公噸。集團指，展望第一季餘下時間，預期市場需求將於農曆新年假期放緩期後逐步回升。



編輯：張詩民

title: 財政預算案｜陳茂波明早發表預算案後　演辭文本民政諮詢中心派發
news_content:
財政司司長陳茂波明日向立法會提交新一份《財政預算案》。立法會會議於上午11時開始，屆時陳茂波將動議二讀《2026年撥款條例草案》，並介紹2026至27財政年度政府收支預算概要。

陳茂波明日下午3時，會在政府總部舉行《財政預算案》記者會；晚上7時30分會出席由電視台聯合製作的《財政預算案論壇》；星期四早上8時出席聯合電台節目《財政司司長熱線》。

《財政預算案》演辭及其他有關資料會在《財政預算案》網頁同步發放，演辭文本和摘要單張會在預算案發布後，在民政事務總署轄下20個民政諮詢中心派發。摘要單張亦會在預算案發布後，於17座政府辦公大樓、7間公共圖書館、5間博物館、10個勞工處勞資關係科分區辦事處、10個勞工處就業中心及三個行業性招聘中心、69個公共屋邨商場派發。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 證監會獲香港及英國法院命令　凍結內幕交易嫌疑犯430萬元資產
news_content:
證監會對香港交易所前職員陳政華與姻親林祖文及周志光提出法律程序，獲香港原訟法庭頒發全球臨時強制令。有關人士涉嫌進行最少7家香港上市公司股份的內幕交易。證監會亦取得英格蘭及威爾斯高等法院商業及財產法庭發出臨時強制令，凍結陳政華及周志光在英格蘭及威爾斯的資產。

兩項命令禁止3名嫌疑犯處置，或減少在香港及海外的資產價值，其中陳政華及林祖文以合共約370萬港元價值為限，周志光則以約60萬港元價值為限。證監會說，由於3名嫌疑犯已離開香港並將資產轉移至境外，證監會取得的英國命令將確保仍有資產可用於履行法庭日後頒布的補償。

證監會指出，在2020年6月初至去年3月初期間，陳政華擔任港交所上市科助理副總裁時，曾於多家香港上市公司對外公布機密及股價敏感資料前，取得相關資料，並透過由林祖文持有的證券帳戶買賣有關公司股份。林祖文亦被指曾向周志光披露相關內幕消息，對方其後亦曾買賣相關股份。

證監會說，即使市場違規者身處香港境外，證監會仍決心就他們所犯的失當行為追究責任。



編輯：張詩民

title: 人行明日開展6000億元人民幣1年期MLF操作
news_content:
人民銀行公布，明日將開展6000億元人民幣中期借貸便利（MLF）操作，期限1年，將以固定數量、利率招標、多重價位中標方式開展，以保持銀行體系流動性充裕。



編輯：宋家樑

title: Hong Kong stocks close lower
news_content:
Hong Kong stocks ended lower on Tuesday, with the benchmark Hang Seng Index down 1.8 percent at 26,590.

The Shanghai Composite Index finished up 0.9 percent at 4,117, while the Shenzhen Component Index closed 1.4 percent higher at 14,291. (Xinhua)


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 數碼通中期盈利按年升逾8%　派息14.5仙
news_content:
數碼通截至去年12月底的中期盈利近2.8億元，按年增長8.4%，中期息維持每股14.5港仙。

公司上半年度總收入按年增長約2%至35.6億元，主要由於手機及配件銷售收入增加。

期內，流動服務月費計劃ARPU保持穩定，個人外遊數據漫遊收入增長7%，5G家居寬頻業務收入升12%。



編輯：張詩民

title: 港鐵料荃灣綫轉換新信號系統後或出現磨合期　對安全無影響
news_content:
港鐵公布，荃灣綫將於3月15日凌晨轉換至新信號系統，確保運作正常後，由頭班車開始使用新系統行車。

港鐵預期啟用新信號系統後或會出現磨合期。被問到磨合期歷時多久，港鐵說，預料或需一段時間，強調對安全並無影響。

港鐵強調，更換訊號系統屬大型及複雜工程，牽涉多個系統及工序，形容複雜程度有如換腦手術。港鐵說，自前年年中起的18個月，在非行車時間進行多項實地測試，包括模擬日間繁忙時段列車服務安排，期間荃灣綫每列列車均完成至少200公里測試。

港鐵指，新系統採用「以通訊為本列車控制」技術，應用於屯馬綫及東鐵綫等在國際其他鐵路系統亦廣泛應用。港鐵表示，會有序推展其餘三條市區綫信號系統更換工程；其中在港島綫，今年將逐步擴大實地測試範圍並增加測試列車數目。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 楊恩健：修例加強大廈防火措施料最快4月向立法會簡介
news_content:
消防處處長楊恩健表示，宏福苑大火後，當局計劃修訂相關消防條例，以加強大廈的防火措施，預計今年4月至5月向立法會保安事務委員會簡介修例內容，今年內草擬好相關法例。

楊恩健在消防處年結記者會表示，希望透過修例強化消防系統維修時的管理，包括建議引入業主關閉消防裝置時，必須得到消防處批准；處方亦希望擴大消防裝置及設備負責人的責任，加入業主立法團及物管公司，以協助監管消防裝置。針對常見的大廈消防隱患，包括阻塞走火通道又或並無進行消防裝置及設備年檢等，處方建議引入定額罰款機制，增加阻嚇力。

因應宏福苑大火，他說部門成立特大型火警事故行動策略的督導委員會，由負責行動的副處長領導，希望檢視相關的滅火救援策略、指揮系統、又或個人裝備事宜等。

楊恩健說，消防處在宏福苑大火後，進行全港大維修樓宇的消防設備和裝置的巡查，已巡查正進行大維修的461幢大廈，發現當中有22幢大廈的火警鐘有不同程度的損壞，處方向該些大廈發出消除火警危險通知書，當中10幢大廈已經維修好，另外12幢大廈仍在維修有關消防鐘，處方同時有進行檢控行動。

另外，處方成立一個全天候應變小隊，針對發生火警後立即派小隊到現場檢查大廈的消防裝置及設備，已出動281次，發現11幢大廈的火警鐘有不同程度的損壞，已隨即發出消除火警危險通知書給相關大廈業主，希望盡快維修火警鐘。

當局在宏福苑大火後成立獨立委員會。楊恩健說，消防處會全力配合獨立委員會的工作，會提供相關資料以作審視，包括過去對宏福苑大廈的巡查記錄，以及整個滅火行動的資料。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 習近平及李強將晤默茨　中方冀增進理解互信推動中德關係更大發展
news_content:
德國總理默茨明日起正式訪問中國兩日，是他就任以來首次訪華。

在北京，外交部發言人毛寧在例行記者會表示，國家主席習近平將與默茨會面，國務院總理李強亦將與默茨會談，就雙邊關係和共同關心的問題交換意見。中方願同德方以訪問為契機，增進理解互信，深化務實合作，推動中德關係取得更大發展，共同為世界和平與繁榮作出更大貢獻。

商務部發言人回應有關默茨訪華的提問時亦表示，默茨這次率領高規格經貿代表團訪華，有來自汽車、化工、生物製藥、機械製造等德國優勢領域的約30間頭部企業高管隨訪，充分體現德方對深化雙邊經貿關係的強烈意願。中方願與德方一起，通過對話溝通增進了解互信，以實際行動推動中德經貿合作高質量發展，切實發揮對中德、中歐關係壓艙石及推進器作用。



編輯：張萬燕

title: Parents found guilty of bribing kindergarten
news_content:
Thirteen parents and a middleman on Tuesday were found guilty of bribing a kindergarten administrator with HK$1.1 million to secure priority admission for 12 children between 2019 and 2022. 

A former administrator of ESF International Kindergarten (Wu Kai Sha) had previously admitted to accepting bribes. She was responsible for handling the relevant applications at the time. 

The District Court heard that the parents and the intermediary had offered the administrator bribes ranging from HK$20,000 to HK$200,000 in exchange for securing kindergarten places for the children.

An ICAC investigation found that the children had passed the interviews but were initially placed at the bottom of the waiting list for admission. However, after the defendants paid bribes, they were given priority and admitted to the kindergarten. 

Deputy Judge Amy Chan remanded the defendants in custody and adjourned the case until March 31 for sentencing.
 
In a statement, the ICAC said that a culture of integrity is an important foundation of Hong Kong’s education system. It reminded parents that they should never offer bribes to staff in exchange for school places. 

The ICAC also stated that ESF Educational Services rendered full assistance during its investigation into the case.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 華人置業料去年虧損收窄75%至85%
news_content:
華人置業預計，去年綜合虧損收窄75%至85%，前年綜合虧損約21億元；並預計收入由前年約3.4億元減少5%至15%，因租金收入總額減少。

集團指出，虧損收窄主要由於投資物業之公平值變動虧損減少，主要來自位於香港的物業，重申未變現之公平值變動乃非現金項目，對集團現金流量並無構成影響。



編輯：張詩民

title: 勞工處派員調查大埔工業邨工人疑高處墮下致命意外
news_content:
大埔發生工業意外，一名58歲工人懷疑從高處墮下，送院後不治。

勞工處表示，正調查在大埔發生的致命工作意外，處方接報後已即時派員到現場，就意外原因展開調查。

現場是大埔工業邨大富街14號，警方下午約1時半接報，指有工人懷疑進行外牆維修期間，由大約3層樓高的棚架墮下，送往大埔那打素醫院時昏迷，之後證實不治。

title: 'HK to set up academy, funds to boost IP economy'
news_content:
Hong Kong could inaugurate an Intellectual Property Academy by the end of the year, as part of measures in the budget to further boost the city's intellectual property (IP) economy, according to sources. 

It comes as Financial Secretary Paul Chan is scheduled to unveil the budget on Wednesday at 11am, with various sectors eyeing sweeteners to help ease business pressure and improve livelihoods.

According to sources, the academy would be set up by the Intellectual Property Department and the Vocational Training Council to train relevant professionals, so that they can assist companies, especially start-ups, to apply for patents, protect patents, and raise funds.

"Currently, most of such professionals come from the legal field, but more talent from other professional industries are also needed due to the wide-ranging nature of IP protection, such as those involved in IP certification and financing," the source told RTHK.

The source added the government would set aside tens of millions of dollars from the budget to establish the academy, hopefully by the end of the year, and that the new institute would target training working professionals and offer qualifications and career paths for them. 

Separately, the source said the finance minister would propose allocating more funds for the Hong Kong Technology and Innovation Support Centre to help local tech firms evaluate the quality of their products and patents, while facilitating the financing and trading of related products.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 人民幣兌美元收市創逾34個月新高
news_content:
馬年首個交易日，人民幣兌美元收市創逾34個月新高，報6.8849兌1美元，較上交易日收市升265點子。

中金公司外匯團隊認為，美國聯邦最高法院駁回總統特朗普全球關稅政策，美國政府積極尋找其他手段彌補關稅收入損失，令關稅預期不確定性上升，對美元匯率影響或偏向負面。

至於離岸人民幣升至6.88兌1美元關口附近，同創逾34個月新高。



編輯：宋家樑

title: HK to go full throttle in attracting firms to city: CE
news_content:
Chief Executive John Lee said on Tuesday that Hong Kong will go full throttle in the new year to attract more high-value-added industries and high-potential enterprises to set up operations in the city.

"In the coming year, Hong Kong will gallop forward like a spirited steed, boldly embarking on a new journey," he said.

Speaking at a spring reception hosted by the China General Chamber of Commerce, Lee said the city has successfully attracted 102 key enterprises from strategic sectors to Hong Kong over the past three years – focusing on areas such as life sciences and health technology, artificial intelligence, fintech and advanced manufacturing. 

These investments are expected to bring in a total of HK$60 billion over the coming years and create 22,000 new jobs, he said.

Lee said this year marks the inaugural year of China’s 15th Five-Year Plan, and he will lead the SAR government in formulating Hong Kong’s first-ever five-year plan, proactively aligning it with the national 15th Five-Year Plan.

The city's leader called on all sectors of society to actively engage with the national plan, leveraging Hong Kong’s unique advantage under “One Country, Two Systems” – rooted in the motherland and connected to the world – to consolidate traditional pillar industries while actively cultivating new economic growth drivers. 

This, he said, will enhance Hong Kong’s competitiveness and global influence, and enable it to more proactively integrate into and serve the broader national development strategy.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 中方將日本實體列管控名單　外交部︰制止日本再軍事化和擁核企圖
news_content:
在北京，商務部將20間日本實體列入出口管制管控名單，並將20間日本實體列入關注名單。

外交部發言人毛寧主持例行記者會時回應，為了維護國家安全和利益、履行防擴散等國際義務，中方依法依規採取措施，目的是制止日本再軍事化和擁核企圖，完全正當、合理、合法。



編輯︰張萬燕

title: 工人粉嶺倉庫拆木板高處墮下後不治　東方明秀國際貿易被罰44萬
news_content:
東方明秀國際貿易有限公司因去年一宗致命意外，違反《職業安全及健康條例》的規定，被勞工處檢控，今日在粉嶺裁判法院被判罰款44萬元。

事發去年4月，一名工人在粉嶺一個倉庫內，拆除一幅由地板到倉庫頂的木製間隔板時，從木摺梯上墮下，頭部受傷送院，18日後離世。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 'Major safety reform after Wang Fuk Court fire'
news_content:
The Fire Services Department on Tuesday said it has implemented a comprehensive package of reforms in the wake of the deadly fire at Wang Fuk Court last November aimed at preventing similar tragedies and boosting public safety.

Presenting the department’s year-end review for 2025, Director of Fire Services Andy Yeung outlined a series of measures designed to strengthen emergency response and fire prevention.

"First, we have established dedicated inspection teams to conduct thorough checks on fire safety devices and equipment, specifically targeting buildings undergoing major renovations," Yeung said.

He said these teams will focus on testing fire alarms and hose reel systems, while also initiating investigations and enforcement action where problems are identified.

The department has also set up round-the-clock quick response teams. 

"When a fire occurs in a building, they will immediately and proactively go to the scene to inspect the operational status of the relevant fire safety devices," he said. 

"This ensures responsible parties are maintaining them in effective working condition, and allows us to take enforcement action against any violations."

Another reform involves better communication with the public, with the department issuing a circular requiring contractors to post standardised damage notices in visible areas when equipment like fire hose reels or manual alarm points are out of service. 

These notices, Yeung said, will clearly state the date of the outage and the affected areas, ensuring residents are fully aware of any temporary lapses in safety infrastructure.

Yeung added that the department is also ramping up its public education efforts. 

"We are actively strengthening publicity, education and training for the public, owners' corporations and property management companies," he said. 

"We encourage more frequent testing of fire safety equipment and fire drills, and recommend arranging disaster preparedness lectures beforehand."

Yeung reported a 4.9 percent decrease in the total number of fire calls which fell to 35,972 last year, from 37,828 in 2024. 

However, he said the number of building fires resulting in casualties or damage rose by 25 cases, reaching a total of 2,000.

The primary causes of these fires, according to Yeung, were electrical faults and human factors, such as the careless disposal of cigarette butts or candles setting things alight.

Despite the rise in serious building fires, Yeung said the department maintained a robust inspection regime. 

Last year, officers conducted over 447,000 fire prevention inspections, issued nearly 17,100 fire hazard abatement notices and initiated approximately 3,460 prosecutions.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 恒指低收491點　北水重臨成交額升至逾2500億元
news_content:
港股跟隨隔晚美股跌勢，恒生指數低開近170點後，跌幅擴大至逾600點，低見26480點，收市報26590點，跌491點，跌幅近2%。北水重臨，帶動主板成交額升至近2510億元。

科技指數失守5300點，收報5270點，跌逾2%。ATMXJ跌逾1%至逾4%，以美團跌幅較大。

醫藥股多數向下，中生製藥跌近7%，翰森製藥跌逾6%，是跌幅最大兩隻藍籌股。部分新消費和保險股沽壓較大，泡泡瑪特和中人壽跌近6%或以上。

金融股個別發展，中午公布業績的渣打升逾3%。周三公布業績的滙控跌0.4%，港交所跌1%。

公用股逆市上升，港鐵和長建升近2%。部分本地地產股向上，恒地及信置都升逾2%。

萬洲國際升逾4%，是表現最好恒指成份股。



編輯：宋家樑

title: New Tsuen Wan Line signalling system to go live Mar 15
news_content:
A new signalling system will go live on the Tsuen Wan Line on March 15 replacing the existing system that has been in operation for two decades, the MTR announced on Tuesday. 

The company said each train on the line has undergone at least 200 kilometres of test runs under the new system over the past 18 months to ensure safety. 

This included simulations of train services during daytime peak hours. 

HK Chan, chief of operations engineering service and innovation, said there will be potential initial teething issues, such as trains not aligning properly at platforms, but stressed that there would be no safety concerns.

“Safety is the primary consideration,” he said. 

“We make use of different kinds of computer simulations to ensure the system is in maturity and also in stability before we carry out the site tests.”

“And then we carry out repeated site tests to ensure relevant safety regulation requirements are fulfilled.”

Cheris Lee, deputy director of operating and metro segment, said there are currently no plans to increase train frequencies on the line despite the system upgrade.

“For the Tsuen Wan Line, we are running a very frequent service during peak hours already,” she said. 

“So we are in the view that the existing train frequencies can meet the demand already.”

The system upgrade will next be extended to the Island, Kwun Tong and Tseung Kwan O lines.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 政府擬開設首長級職位擔任駐吉隆坡經貿辦處長
news_content:
政府計劃在新成立的駐吉隆坡經貿辦，開設一個首長級丙級政務官的常額職位，擔任該經貿辦的處長，年薪開支約為248萬元。

商務及經濟發展局局長丘應樺表示，駐吉隆坡經貿辦已於去年12月起逐步投入運作，派駐當地的非首長級人員亦分批到經貿辦的臨時辦公室進行前期工作，包括在當地建立聯繫網絡及籌備成立長期辦公室。若開設新職位的建議，獲立法會工商及創新科技事務委員會支持，政府會於今年第二季內，將有關建議提交人事編制小組委員會和財務委員會審批。

丘應樺出席委員會會議時表示，當地商界十分歡迎香港在吉隆坡成立經貿辦，認為有助香港與馬來西亞的經貿往來。隨著駐吉隆坡經貿辦的成立，特區政府已經相應擴大駐東盟國家經貿辦的覆蓋範圍，除了現時的12個國家，亦新增東帝汶、巴基斯坦和斯里蘭卡3個國家，進一步加強香港與東盟和周邊亞洲國家的雙邊關係，推動經濟和文化交流，促進區內投資和貿易往來。

多名議員表示支持開設相關首長級職位，同時關注新經貿辦的績效指標 KPI。商經局署理常任秘書長郭頴詩表示，每個派駐外地的經貿辦都有制定相應 KPI，有信心今年4個駐東盟國家的經貿辦，工作會比以往做得更多和更好。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: HK govt condemns 'takeover' of Panama ports
news_content:
Secretary for Commerce and Economic Development Algernon Yau on Tuesday delivered a stern protest to the Panamanian Consul-General, expressing the SAR government's strong opposition to the country's takeover of ports run by CK Hutchison.

This came after authorities in the Central American country officially cancelled contracts with the conglomerate to operate the ports of Balboa and Cristobal, near the Panama Canal.

Yau said the SAR government was strongly dissatisfied and opposed to the move. 

"The forcible takeover and the revocation of operating rights... undermine the spirit of contract," he said in a statement. 

"[We] emphasise our firm support for and protection of the lawful rights and interests of Hong Kong enterprises overseas."

A government spokesperson noted the Panamanian government took over the ports despite arbitration proceedings initiated by the company concerned, and that the SAR administration condemned the move and described it as "a brutal act".

CK Hutchison, for its part, described the takeover as unlawful, stressing that the firm and its subsidiary operating the ports would continue to consult its lawyers and reserve all rights and recourse against the country and other parties.

"None of the actions by the Panama State were advised to or co-ordinated with [our subsidiary, Panama Ports Company]," it said in a statement.

"The Panama State is responsible for harm and damage caused by the confiscatory actions it has taken."

Panama's Supreme Court had ruled to cancel the contracts last month, citing constitutional violations.

The country officially gazetted the ruling on Monday to finalise the cancellation. The move clears the way for APM Terminals – a subsidiary of the Danish shipping firm Maersk – to take over temporarily. 

Last week, CK Hutchison warned of possible legal action against Maersk and others. It also said it would challenge Panama's decision at the International Chamber of Commerce. 

Beijing has also criticised the court ruling as absurd and an act of bad faith, and vowed to defend the interests of Chinese firms.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: China slams 'takeover' of Panama ports
news_content:
China will resolutely safeguard the legitimate rights and interests of the company in question, Foreign Ministry spokeswoman Mao Ning said on Tuesday, following a takeover by Panamanian authorities of two Panama Canal ports operated by CK Hutchison.

Speaking in a regular press briefing in Beijing, Mao reiterated that China's stance on the port-related issues in Panama is clear, saying the relevant firm had issued a statement, indicating that it reserves all rights, including resorting to legal procedures.

The comments came after authorities in the Central American country officially cancelled contracts with the conglomerate to operate the ports of Balboa and Cristobal, near the Panama Canal.

In Hong Kong, Secretary for Commerce and Economic Development Algernon Yau delivered a stern protest to the Panamanian Consul-General, expressing the SAR government's strong opposition to the takeover of ports.

Yau said the SAR government was strongly dissatisfied and opposed to the move by Panama.

"The forcible takeover and the revocation of operating rights... undermine the spirit of contract," he said in a statement.

"[We] emphasise our firm support for and protection of the lawful rights and interests of Hong Kong enterprises overseas."

A government spokesperson noted the Panamanian government took over the ports despite arbitration proceedings initiated by the company concerned, and that the SAR administration condemned the move and described it as "a brutal act".

CK Hutchison, for its part, described the takeover as unlawful, stressing that the firm and its subsidiary operating the ports would continue to consult its lawyers and reserve all rights and recourse against the country and other parties.

"None of the actions by the Panama State were advised to or co-ordinated with [our subsidiary, Panama Ports Company]," it said in a statement.

"The Panama State is responsible for harm and damage caused by the confiscatory actions it has taken."

Panama's Supreme Court had ruled to cancel the contracts last month, citing constitutional violations.

The country officially gazetted the ruling on Monday to finalise the cancellation. The move clears the way for APM Terminals – a subsidiary of the Danish shipping firm Maersk – to take over temporarily.

Last week, CK Hutchison warned of possible legal action against Maersk and others. It also said it would challenge Panama's decision at the International Chamber of Commerce.

title: 會財局：去年違規不算太多　強調監管質素要有底線
news_content:
會計及財務匯報局主席孫德基表示，當局以風險為本角度為本港執業單位「驗身」，去年抽樣逾60家執業單位進行察查，檢視他們的項目有否符合審計會計標準。他提到，去年完成約30個主要調查，處理超過10宗處分，認為去年不算太多違規情況，但強調監管要有力度，質素要有底線。 

孫德基提到，對無牌會計師「零容忍」，必定會跟進，又關注近年更換會計師、會計師費用存在惡性競爭。

他又認為，新股市場熾熱為會計行業帶來機遇及危機，會財局早前亦發表公開信，就人力資源調配提點業界，期望他們能評估審計公司上市申請的能力，不要令審計質素下降。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 外交部︰中方在巴拿馬有關港口問題上立場明確
news_content:
在北京，外交部發言人毛寧表示，中方在巴拿馬有關港口問題上的立場是明確的，將堅决維護企業的正當合法權益。

毛寧在例行記者會回應有記者就巴拿馬有關港口問題的提問，表示相信對方亦注意到有關企業已經發表聲明，表示將保留包括訴諸法律程序在內的一切權利。



編輯︰張萬燕

title: 消防處：去年防火巡查共44萬7千多次　檢控約3460次
news_content:
消防處表示，去年的火警召喚宗數按年下跌4.9%至近36000宗，成災樓宇火警增加25宗，至2000宗。至於召達時間內到場達96.1%，較服務承諾高3.6%。特別服務宗數按年升8%至近42500宗。

消防處處長楊恩健在年結記者會表示，去年全年防火巡查共有44萬7千多次，共發出近17100張消防火警危險通知書，全年提出檢控約3460次。

因應大埔宏福苑五級火後，處方推出多項針對措施，包括成立專責巡查隊，成立全天候快速應變小隊，加強消防裝置失效警示，加強宣傳教育及培訓。

另外，消防處去年全年接獲的緊急救護召喚按年下跌0.8%至近77萬8800次，召達時間內到場95.9%，較服務承諾高3.4%。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 內地股市馬年首個交易日紅盤高收近1%或以上
news_content:
滬深股市在馬年首個交易日升近1%或以上，油氣開採及服務、貴金屬等股份上升；影視院線、人工智能應用、旅遊及酒店等股份向下。

深證成份指數報14291點，升191點，升幅1.36%。

創業板指數報3308點，升32點，升幅0.99%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 港鐵荃灣綫3月15日啟用新信號系統
news_content:
港鐵荃灣綫新信號系統所有測試已完成並通過政府審批，將於3月15日投入服務，取代自1996年沿用至今的舊有系統。

港鐵指，參考業界在系統切換後的磨合期經驗，新系統於實際營運載客時，初期可能出現不影響行車安全的個別情況，例如列車停站時車門與月台幕門的位置或未能完全精準對齊，或於個別路段出現自動的速度調整。

港鐵說，會密切監察新信號系統運作表現，並已制訂全面的應變管理方案；在新信號系統投入服務初期，現有信號系統將暫時保留，作為整體應變及風險管理措施的一部分。

港鐵正推展四條市區綫荃灣綫、港島綫、觀塘綫及將軍澳綫的信號系統更換工程。港鐵預計，按現時進度，每年可完成一條市區綫的信號系統更換工程，預料整體項目將於2029年完成。



編輯：李俊傑

title: 14人行賄行政主任安排學童插隊入讀英基幼稚園　貪污罪成還押
news_content:
廉政公署早前起訴13名家長及1名中間人，行賄英基烏溪沙幼稚園一名時任行政主任，以安排12名學童獲優先插隊入讀該校幼兒班，賄款共約110萬元。14名被告經審訊後，今日在區域法院被裁定貪污罪名成立，暫委法官將全部被告還押懲教署看管，案件押後至下月31日判刑。涉案幼稚園職員早前已承認收賄。

該13名家長來自11個家庭，連同案中被控的商人，全部人年齡介乎35歲至48歲，廉署早前接獲貪污投訴後，展開調查。案件涉及2019至2022年3個學年的幼兒班入學申請。該校每年9月接受入學申請，於2018年9月至2021年8月案發期間，相關申請由時任行政主任林珍妮處理。

案情透露，案中13名家長及商人分別向林珍妮提供2萬元至20萬元不等的賄款，以換取英基提供幼兒班學位予12名學童，即涉案11個家庭的子女，以及涉案商人生意夥伴的女兒。

廉署調查發現，涉案的12名學童通過幼兒班入學面試後，原本在校方收生輪候名單中排在較後位置，但各被告支付賄款後，該12名學童均獲優先插隊入讀該幼稚園。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 李家超：新一年香港馬力全開　吸引更多高增值產業高潛力企業落戶
news_content:
行政長官李家超出席香港中華總商會春節酒會致賀辭時表示，在新的一年，香港會有如駿馬奔騰，勇啟新程。今年是國家十五五規劃開局之年，他會帶領特區政府制訂香港第一個五年規劃，主動對接國家十五規劃，帶領社會各界積極對接十五規劃，發揮香港在一國兩制下，背靠祖國聯通世界的獨特優勢，在鞏固傳統優勢產業的同時，積極開拓新經濟增長點，提升香港的競爭力和國際影響力，更主動融入和服務國家發展大局。

李家超強調，在新一年，香港會騰躍四海，積極發揮香港超級聯繫人和超級增值人的角色。特區政府已於去年成立全新的內地企業出海專班，主動招攬內地企業利用香港出海，並透過專班下的跨界別專業服務平台，配對香港的世界級專業服務業，協助出海的企業，同時善用香港龐大的經貿網絡，成立新的經貿一站通，更有系統幫助中小企和初創企業，了解不同市場的脈搏開拓海外商機。

他指出，在新一年，香港會馬力全開，吸引更多高增值產業和高潛力的企業落戶香港。現屆政府上任後成立的引進重點企業辦公室，在3年多以來，已經吸引102間策略產業的重點企業落戶香港，聚焦包括生命健康科技、人工智能、金融科技先進製造等，預計未來幾年帶來600億元的總投資，創造22000新職位。

李家超提到，香港經濟增長馬步穩健，2025年香港經濟按年增長達到3.5%，貨品出口和進口總額分別按年上升12%；本地零售市場亦穩步復甦，去年零售業總額貨值回復增長；香港是國際金融航運貿易中心，去年在多項的國際排名繼續一馬當先。去年在香港註冊的本地公司和經遷冊到香港的公司，按年大增9萬6千多間；駐港的海外和內地公司數目增加11%，達到1萬1千多間；初創公司的數量也都增加11%，有5200多間，這三個數字都破頂創新高。

出席酒會的還有全國政協副主席梁振英、中聯辦副主任張勇、外交部駐港特派員公署副特派員李永勝、立法會主席李慧琼及行政會議召集人葉劉淑儀等。


編輯：譚佩貞

title: 日股高收近0.9%
news_content:
日本股市反覆向上，日經平均指數收市報57321點，升495點，升幅0.87%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 台股再創新高　連升5個交易日
news_content:
台灣股市連升5個交易日，再創即市及收市新高。

加權指數高見34786點，收市報34700點，升927點，升幅2.75%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 春節假期全國邊檢機關查檢近1780萬人次出入境　按年增一成
news_content:
國家移民管理局公布，今年春節假期全國邊檢機關共計查驗1779.6萬人次中外人員出入境，每日平均197.7萬人次，較去年春節假期日均增長超過一成，全國口岸出入境安全高效有序，其中上周六為單日出入境通關最高峰，近226萬人次。

當局表示，內地居民出入境951.4萬人次，較去年假期日均增長超過一成；港澳台居民接近697萬人次，較去年假期日均增長8%；外國人131.3萬人次，較去年假期日均增長21.8%；入境外國人中，適用免簽政策入境46萬人次，較去年假期日均增長28.5%。

另外，當局今年春節假期共計查驗出入境交通運輸工具70.5萬架次，較去年假期日均增長超過19%。

發言人說，全國邊檢機關人員全力以赴做好春節假期口岸通關保障工作，提前預測並公布大型口岸出入境人員流量高峰時段，提醒出入境旅客合理安排行程、錯峰出行；又開足查驗通道，加強提示引導，確保中國公民出入境通關排隊不超過30分鐘；周密安排高峰期客流疏導和交通配套綜合保障，全力保障旅客順暢通關。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 關愛隊第一期總支出4.44億元　探訪約61萬長者及有需要住戶
news_content:
民政事務總署發布2023年至2025年關愛隊的工作總結報告。關愛隊去年10月已完成第一期服務，兩年間合共探訪約61萬個長者戶及有需要住戶、提供約10萬次簡單家居或支援服務，以及舉辦約5萬項地區活動。

資源方面，關愛隊第一期的整體服務計劃總支出為4.44億元，當中共4.11億元的支出是由政府按資助協議所發放的資助承擔，即92%，而餘下支出，即8%，則由關愛隊凝聚社區資源所支付。政府撥備4.52億元作為第一期關愛隊的資助，最後關愛隊只使用了當中的91%。

民政及青年事務局局長麥美娟說，第一期關愛隊的成績有目共睹。關愛隊亦協助突發和緊急服務支援。在地區發生突發和緊急事故，例如宏福苑大火、鰂魚涌發現戰時炸彈、超強颱風樺加沙和連場暴雨襲港等，關愛隊迅速動員，關心受影響人士的需要及提供適當支援。

其中，在大埔宏福苑火災善後支援中，有超過1900名來自全港18區的關愛隊隊員及義工，迅速響應政府號召，積極參與緊急支援。他們不分晝夜，跨區趕赴臨時庇護中心為災民登記及送遞暖飯和被鋪、協助整理和分發捐獻物資等工作。她期望公眾能透過這份報告，更深入認識關愛隊的工作成果，增進對社區服務的了解，並鼓勵市民參與關愛隊工作。

第二期全港18區455隊關愛隊已緊接第一期，在去年10月全面投入服務。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: 渣打去年度香港基本稅前溢利升40%　繼續為盈利貢獻最大地區
news_content:
渣打集團去年基本稅前溢利升16%至79億美元，當中香港26.6億美元，按年升40%，繼續是盈利貢獻最大地區。

去年香港經營收入53.5億美元，按年升近17%。信貸減值收窄約半成至2.5億美元。

去年內地基本稅前收入跌至3.76億美元，按年跌近24%。至於英國轉盈，賺2.4億美元，對上年度蝕逾1.9億美元。

單計去年第4季，香港基本稅前溢利逾6.8億美元，按年升近1.3倍，經營收入13.5億美元，按年升近19%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: StanChart pre-tax profit up 16pc in 2025
news_content:
Standard Chartered on Tuesday reported that its pre-tax profit for 2025 climbed 16 percent year on year to US$6.96 billion, as robust global banking and strong wealth inflows boosted revenue.

The lender, which earns most of its revenue in Asia and Africa, also saw its full-year operating income grow by seven percent year on year to US$20.9 billion.

Profits picked up in the final quarter, rising by two percent year on year to US$814 million, though that was lower than analysts' expectations of US$1.06 billion.

The full-year pre-tax profits also missed the US$7.2 billion average of 16 analyst estimates compiled by the lender.

In a statement, chief executive Bill Winters said the bank saw strong momentum last year, with its adjusted return on tangible equity, a gauge of profitability, hitting 14.7 percent for the full year, exceeding its 13 percent target.

"We have made a good start to the year and continue to benefit from a supportive business environment," he said.

"We are seeing robust growth in our larger markets, and structural shifts in global trade and investment play to our distinctive strengths serving our clients' cross-border and affluent banking needs." 

The emerging market-focused lender proposed a final dividend of 49 US cents per share, bringing the full-year total to 61 US cents per share, up by 65 percent from a year earlier. 

The bank also announced it was launching a new share buyback of US$1.5 billion, which it said would be "commenced imminently".

Looking ahead, it said it sees reported operating income growth year on year to be around the bottom end of five to seven percent range at constant currency. (Additional reporting by Reuters)



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 長江生命科技成立科學顧問委員會　支持科研項目全速前進
news_content:
長江生命科技委任行政會議成員、前食物及衛生局局長高永文，出任新成立的科學顧問委員會主席，將指引委員會方向，匯聚專業見解並轉化為策略建議。他表示，將提供獨立專業意見，促進科研在嚴謹的過程中穩步發展，支持負責任的創新。

集團表示，科學顧問委員會屬策略性組織，由來自學術界、臨床研究及業界的獨立專家組成，將提供科學、臨床及規管指引，以支持集團科研項目全速前進，包括多項正準備展開臨床研究的治療性癌症疫苗。

委員會將提供專業資源，幫助公司應對日趨繁複的環球藥物研發環境、緩減風險，以及加快獲得監管批核和接觸病患者的途徑，標誌集團進入科學發展新階段。


編輯：李意琴

title: 黃建業認為住宅市道已開始由谷底反彈
news_content:
新一份財政預算案明日發表。美聯集團主席黃建業認為，今年有不少利好因素支持樓市穩定上升，特別受惠股市表現，住宅市道已開始由谷底反彈，認為政府毋須額外推出措施刺激樓市，但100元印花稅的適用樓價範圍應有放寬空間。

他指出，政府應增加力度支持工商舖市道，指出零售和消費市道已經轉變，市場需要時間尋找支持點，建議進一步放寬投資移民投資相關物業限制。

黃建業提到，最近有住宅買家追價入市，認為金融業表現良好，帶動各行業表現，息口亦已較高位回落，供平過租再次出現，支持首置購買力加快入市，預計今年樓價有望升10%，全年住宅交投達8.5萬宗。

他說，今年將加快擴充人手和分行，以追貼市場表現。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 渣打去年淨息差收窄3個基點至2.03厘
news_content:
渣打去年列帳基準經營收入按年升7%，至209.4億美元。基本營業收入升6%至209億美元，若剔除重大項目增加8%。淨利息收入上升1%至112億美元；經常性收入帶動環球市場業務上升12%。環球銀行業務上升15%。

集團去年信貸減值擴大21%，至近6.8億美元。財富管理及零售銀行業務減值減少2800萬美元，反映貸款組合優化措施的成效。創投業務支出按年減少1400萬美元，因Mox拖欠率改善。但企業及投資銀行業務減值支出淨額增加1.24億美元，因並無回撥。

去年有形股東權益回報14.7%，上升3厘；有形股東權益列帳基準回報11.9%。

集團截至去年底，淨息差收窄3個基點至2.03厘，因減息及邊際利潤受壓的影響，部分被資產及存款組合改善抵銷。

集團表示，保留一筆與內地商業房地產有關的一般性額外撥加3600萬美元，並就香港商業房地產行業面臨相關風險的客戶，作出額外撥加4700萬美元。去年香港及內地商業房地產額外撥加分別減少1100萬美元及3400萬美元，主要受風險敞口變動及還款帶動。

渣打去年第4季列帳基準稅前溢利逾8億美元，按年升2%。基本稅前溢利升18%至逾12億美元。淨息差收窄12個基點至2.09厘。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 'Carefully managed access to Mai Po can boost tourism'
news_content:
The executive director of the Travel Industry Council, Fanny Yeung, said opening up part of the Mai Po closed area could boost tourism, but authorities must be very careful about conservation safeguards and how accessibility is managed.

Speaking on RTHK's Backchat programme on Tuesday, she said widening access to Mai Po would attract more tourists since it is a Ramsar-listed wetland site, which is internationally recognised for its biodiversity and the migratory bird population.

"It could attract ecotourism visitors, bird watchers, and also be a good development for study tours, which strengthens Hong Kong's image as a hub for environmental education," she said.

The Security Bureau noted in a document submitted to the Legislative Council earlier in February that it is planning to amend the Frontier Closed Area Order to further open up the area for convenient access to Mai Po. 

Citizens would only need to apply for a Mai Po Marsh Entry Permit from the Agriculture, Fisheries and Conservation Department in accordance with the existing Wild Animals Protection Ordinance, and would no longer be required to apply for a Frontier Close Area Permit from the police. 

Yeung suggested the number of people and their time inside the restricted area should be strictly controlled, adding that guides could be arranged to lead the visitors.

She noted that bird migration and nesting times should also be taken into account when a visit is planned, especially during peak migratory seasons.

She added there should also be a limited quota on small-to-medium sized coaches carrying visitors due to the sensitive ecological environment of Mai Po.


Edited by Tony Sabine

title: 日本福岡縣幼兒園校車與私家車相撞　14人傷包括9名幼兒
news_content:
日本福岡縣發生幼兒園校車與私家車相撞事故，造成包括9名幼兒在內共14人受傷。

警方表示，在當地上午9時許接報稱，兩架車發生碰撞，14人受傷送院。

警方將就事故原因展開調查。




編輯：方潤南

title: 恒指下午初段跌近2%
news_content:
港股下午初段持續向下，恒指較早時報26551點，跌530點，跌近2%。

科技指數報5261點，跌124點，跌逾2%。



編輯：宋家樑

title: 丘應樺向巴拿馬駐港總領事嚴正抗議　譴責強行接管兩港口粗暴行徑
news_content:
商務及經濟發展局局長丘應樺向巴拿馬駐港總領事提出嚴正抗議，特區政府對巴拿馬政府昨日強行接管和記港口巴拿馬港口公司經營的兩個巴拿馬港口，並撤銷經營權，破壞合約精神，表達強烈不滿和反對，強調會堅定支持和維護香港企業在海外的合法權益。
　　​
特區政府發言人重申，巴拿馬最高法院早前裁定該公司經營的兩個巴拿馬港口違憲一事，完全是罔顧事實，背信棄義。相關公司已提出並啓動仲裁程序，但巴拿馬政府昨日強行接管兩個港口，嚴重損害香港企業的合法權益和違反合約精神。特區政府對此粗暴行徑予以譴責。

特區政府再次敦促巴拿馬政府尊重合約精神，為當地依法營運的企業提供公平、公正的營商環境，確保企業的合法權益不受干預。香港企業在巴拿馬經營和投資，應獲公平合理的待遇和保障。發言人強調，相關公司多年來在當地投入巨額投資和創造大量職位，有關裁決及巴拿馬政府的無理行為自毀國家信用，嚴重破壞國際貿易規則。



編輯：譚佩貞

title: Govt seeks funding to expand CCTV system
news_content:
Security Secretary Chris Tang explained on Tuesday that HK$4 billion is needed not only to add the CCTV cameras required to keep the city safe but also to build the network and data systems to go with them, as the government seeks Legco funding approval.

Tang told a panel meeting that the first phase of the “SmartView” programme had ended last year, with 5,000 cameras installed. 

He said the system helped solve nearly 900 cases - including six murders and 30 robberies. 

Tang said the plan is to add 20,000 more cameras each year, reaching about 60,000 by 2028. He said most of the money is needed for infrastructure.
 
"I understand some lawmakers and people may think HK$4 billion is expensive. But I want to stress we are building a system to keep the city safe. The cameras themselves are only about 1 percent of the total cost, roughly a thousand dollars per camera," he said. 

"The real spending is on the system: building the network infrastructure, laying optical fibre, and creating a video management platform to handle large amounts of data."

He said the expanded system will strengthen the analysis of images using artificial intelligence, helping to prevent crime and assist law enforcement. For example, it could be used to track the movements of criminals using facial recognition technology. 

In terms of privacy protection, Tang said that the data on the system would be encrypted and that access permissions would be controlled. 

Additionally, notices informing the public will be displayed in any area where cameras are installed. 

He added that the system is crucial for both Hong Kong and national security, and that the government must ensure that geopolitics does not affect the procurement and supply of necessary equipment.



Edited by Thomas McAlinden

title: 推展銳眼計劃涉40.6億元　鄧炳強：實事求是已壓縮使費
news_content:
立法會保安事務委員會討論警務處擬為「銳眼」計劃推展第二及第三階段，預計到2028年增加共6萬支閉路電視鏡頭覆蓋全港，並在2028年至2031年額外增加約6500支鏡頭。預計涉及的非經常開支合共40億6千萬元。

保安局局長鄧炳強表示，聽到聲音指價錢貴，他強調今次安裝的鏡頭是用以保障城市安全的系統，而安裝鏡頭的開支只佔整體開支百分之一，即約5200萬元，平均1000元一支鏡頭。對於有人要求再壓縮使費，鄧炳強表示，自己是實事求是的人，不會將開支誇大，然後在議會內作出刪減以顯示有做事。他又說過去兩年來，已做大量工作壓縮使費，40億元的開支已全無水份，甚至有同事指他刻薄。

選委界議員姚柏良詢問鄧炳強，安裝更多閉路電視鏡頭後，是否可以節省人手，令警隊人手編制有所調整。鄧炳強回應說，警方可透過系統了解哪些地方罪案率較高，從而加強人手巡邏，另外可利用科技節省到的人手，調配以提供其他服務。

另一名選委界議員蘇紹聰關注，系統擴大後的私隱保安問題，以及哪些人可以使用系統查閱資料。他又說，人工智能技術現時並非百分百準確，當局有甚麼機制防止出現「點錯相」的機會。鄧炳強說，使用系統的人需要先經過訓練，要有自己的帳戶和密碼，使用前要先獲授權，亦有機制監察誰人曾經使用系統，相信已有足夠保障。



編輯：譚佩貞
